name: Hokkaido “晓” A Grade Bafun Sea Urchin (Uni)｜北海“晓”A级马粪海胆
category: 北海道标准级(A)&上选级(SA)马粪海胆 ｜Hokkaido Regular Grade (A) & Selected Grade (SA) Sea Urchin (Uni)
description:
产品概述
北海道「晓」马粪海胆以干净的海味与自然鲜甜著称，属于北海道产区人气海胆品牌之一。A 级定位为品牌体系中的经典标准等级，兼具稳定品质与高性价比，适合日常刺身、寿司及海胆丼等多种用法。
口感风味
色泽金黄自然，入口绵密柔滑，带明显甜味与鲜味层次，余韵清爽不腻，海味纯净。
产品亮点
✅ 北海道产区：海味纯净，风味清爽
✅ A Grade 经典等级：品质稳定、性价比高
✅ 口感细腻：绵密顺滑、自然甜润
✅ 料理百搭：刺身/寿司/丼饭皆宜
✅ Omakase / 寿司店常用：适合日常高频出品
推荐吃法
刺身｜寿司｜海胆丼｜手卷｜拌饭｜海胆意面

Overview
Hokkaido “Akatsuki” Bafun Uni is known for its clean ocean flavor and natural sweetness. A Grade represents the brand’s classic standard selection, offering stable quality and excellent value. It’s a versatile choice for sashimi, sushi, uni don, and everyday premium dining.
Taste Profile
Naturally golden in color with a smooth, creamy texture. Delivers clean sweetness, delicate umami, and a light, refreshing finish.
Key Highlights
✅ Sourced from Hokkaido with clean ocean flavor
✅ A Grade Classic Selection: stable quality & great value
✅ Smooth & creamy texture with natural sweetness
✅ Versatile use: sashimi, sushi, uni don & more
✅ Popular for sushi bars & omakase service
Best For
Sashimi | Sushi | Uni Don | Hand Rolls | Rice Topping | Uni Pasta

name: 北海道 漫画 888 SP马粪海胆|Hokkaido "Ogawa888" SP Bafun Sea Urchin (Uni)｜
category: 🇯🇵 北海道高级(SP)马粪海胆 ｜ Hokkaido Special Grade (SP) Sea Urchin (Uni)
description:
产品概述
北海道「Ogawa888 / 888」SP马粪海胆属于品牌体系的 SP（Special 特选）等级，以更严格标准筛选颗粒完整度、色泽均匀度与整体风味表现。相比普通等级，SP更强调“卖相干净漂亮、口感更细腻甜润”，非常适合寿司店与Omakase料理作为高端稳定出品。
口感风味
色泽金黄饱满，入口绵密细滑，甜味更突出、鲜味更深，海胆香气集中，余韵干净且回甘明显。
产品亮点
✅ 北海道产区：海味纯净，风味自然清甜
✅ Ogawa888 / 888品牌精选：稳定品质，高辨识度
✅ SP特选等级：颗粒更完整、碎粒更少、色泽更均匀
✅ 口感更细腻甜润：奶油感强、回甘明显
✅ Omakase常用：适合寿司/刺身高端呈现
推荐吃法
刺身（推荐）｜寿司｜海胆手卷｜海胆丼｜拌饭｜搭配香槟/清酒

Overview
Hokkaido “Ogawa888” SP Bafun Uni is a premium selection graded SP (Special) within the brand’s system, curated under stricter standards for lobe integrity, color consistency, and overall flavor refinement. Compared to standard grades, SP uni is known for its cleaner presentation, smoother texture, and sweeter finish, making it a preferred choice for sushi bars and omakase dining.
Taste Profile
Rich golden color with well-formed lobes. Smooth and creamy texture delivering pronounced sweetness, deep umami, and a clean lingering finish.
Key Highlights
✅ Sourced from Hokkaido with clean ocean flavor
✅ Ogawa888 / 888 brand selection with stable quality
✅ SP Grade (Special): more intact lobes, less breakage, consistent color
✅ Creamy, refined, and sweeter finish
✅ Ideal for sushi & omakase service
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Uni Hand Roll | Uni Don | Rice Topping | Pair with Champagne or Sake

Overview
Hokkaido Nemuro “Marukawa” Blue Box SP Bafun Uni is a popular and trusted uni selection from Nemuro, Hokkaido, known for its recognizable Blue Box packaging and stable quality. Graded SP (Special) within the brand’s system, it is curated under stricter standards for lobe integrity, color consistency, and overall refinement, making it an excellent choice for sushi bars and omakase dining.
Taste Profile
Bright golden color with plump, intact lobes. Exceptionally smooth and creamy texture with pronounced sweetness, deep umami, and a clean lingering finish.
Key Highlights
✅ Sourced from Nemuro, Hokkaido with clean ocean flavor
✅ Marukawa Blue Box series with stable quality & strong recognition
✅ SP Grade (Special): more intact lobes, less breakage, consistent color
✅ Creamy and refined sweetness with a clean finish
✅ Ideal for sushi & omakase service
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Uni Hand Roll | Uni Don | Rice Topping | Pair with Champagne or Sake

category: 🇯🇵  Hokkaido北海道特上顶级(SSP)马粪海胆  Omakase天花板｜ Super Special Premium (SSP) Sea Urchin (Uni)
description:
产品概述
这款 「Kaneyo 大极上 黑标（Daigokujo Black Label）」马粪海胆，是北海道海胆中的顶级代表，属于品牌体系的 SSP最高等级。以极高标准精选颗粒完整度、色泽一致性与风味表现，常用于高端寿司店与Omakase料理，被视为“海胆控的天花板”。
口感特点
色泽金黄浓润，入口绵密细腻、奶油感强，甜味与鲜味层次极其突出，余韵悠长，几乎无杂味。
产品亮点
✅ SSP顶级等级：品牌最高级选品标准
✅ 黑标大极上：Omakase顶配用料
✅ 颗粒完整饱满：碎粒少、卖相极佳
✅ 甜味浓郁、鲜味深：回甘明显、余韵更长
✅ 风味干净：更细腻、更高级、更稳定
推荐吃法
刺身（首选）｜寿司｜海胆丼｜海胆手卷｜拌饭｜搭配清酒/香槟
保存建议
冷藏保存 0–4°C，建议尽快食用以保持最佳风味。
 （一般可冷藏保存约 3–5天，以到货状态为准）
等级说明（SSP）
SSP = Super Special Premium（品牌顶级等级）
 代表更高标准的颗粒完整度、颜色一致性与口感细腻度，适合高端Omakase与送礼。

The Kaneyo Daigokujo Black Label Bafun Uni is one of the most premium uni selections from Hokkaido, classified as SSP grade, the highest tier within the brand’s grading system. Carefully selected for exceptional lobe integrity, uniform color, and refined flavor, it is highly sought after by top sushi bars and omakase restaurants.
Taste Profile
Rich golden color with plump, intact lobes. Exceptionally creamy and smooth, delivering deep umami, pronounced sweetness, and a long luxurious finish with minimal off-notes.
Key Highlights
✅ SSP Grade (Top Tier): highest selection standard
✅ Daigokujo Black Label: premium omakase favorite
✅ Beautiful Presentation: intact lobes, minimal breakage
✅ Sweet & Umami-Rich: refined taste with lingering finish
✅ Clean Flavor: consistent, delicate, and luxurious
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Uni Don | Uni Hand Roll | Rice Topping | Pair with Sake or Champagne
Storage
Keep refrigerated at 0–4°C and enjoy as soon as possible for peak quality.
 (Generally stays fresh for 3–5 days, depending on arrival condition.)
Grade Note (SSP)
SSP = Super Special Premium, a top-tier grade indicating superior lobe integrity, color consistency, and the most refined texture and sweetness ideal for premium omakase and gifting.

name: 日本艺术家波多野涉手作和纸Omakase餐垫 ｜Wataru Hatano Handmade Washi Omakase Placemat
category: 优美臻选日本选物｜Uminoya Japan Select
description:
这款和纸餐垫由日本工艺作家 波多野涉（Wataru Hatano） 在京都府绫部市手工制作。
作品以传统 和纸（Washi） 为材质，通过多层纸纤维与天然染色工艺呈现出温润而富有层次的色泽。
不规则的器形与自然边缘，使每一件作品都具有独特的质感与表情。
在日本餐桌文化中，这类和纸器物常被用于摆盘或作为餐垫使用，为料理增添一份宁静而质朴的美感。
KOGEI
Kogei（工艺） 在日本指的是由匠人手工制作的传统工艺作品，强调材料本身的质感与手作痕迹。
波多野涉的作品延续了这种理念，将传统和纸工艺融入现代餐桌生活之中。

山茶花在日本文化中象征优雅与坚韧，常见于传统和风图案之中。手绘花叶与金彩细节，使每只酒杯都带有独特的手作温度。

name: 【十四代 大吟酿 生酒｜播州山田锦｜稀缺款】
category: 优美酒藏精选 ｜Sake Selection
description:
日本顶级清酒品牌「十四代」，高木酒造出品，市场流通极少。
这是一款优质的、未经巴氏杀菌（生）的清酒，采用精米步合为 35% 的龙之乙気米酿造而成。
这款清酒以其纯净优雅的口感而闻名，带有白桃、蜜瓜和富士苹果的香气。
由于其稀有性和高品质，该品牌被认为是极具收藏价值的物品。
冰镇后饮用最佳，以凸显其清新的香气和顺滑的口感。
此款为大吟酿生酒版本，采用播州山田锦酿造，风味纯净细腻，层次丰富，在美国极难买到。
整瓶状态优秀，带原装礼盒，保存良好。

name: 空运秘鲁太阳之子芒果｜树上完熟·极致香甜·无纤维丝滑果肉 Air-Flown Peruvian “Sun Child” Mango | Tree-Ripened · Ultra Sweet · Fiber-Free Silky Flesh
category: 新鲜水果
description:
【商品介绍 | Product Description】
来自秘鲁阳光沃土的“太阳之子芒果”，以近乎苛刻的标准甄选，只为呈现芒果中的巅峰风味。果实在树上自然成熟，顺势蒂落后即刻空运锁鲜，最大程度保留原始甜度与香气。
Sourced from the sun-drenched lands of Peru, the “Sun Child” mango is carefully selected to deliver the pinnacle of mango flavor. Each fruit is naturally tree-ripened and harvested at perfect maturity, then air-flown to preserve its peak sweetness and aroma.
其果皮极薄，轻轻一剥即可露出金黄诱人的果肉；肉质厚实饱满，几乎无纤维，入口如丝绸般顺滑细腻。每一口都饱含阳光的甜润，多汁而不腻，香气浓郁持久。
With its ultra-thin skin, it peels effortlessly to reveal luscious golden flesh. Thick, juicy, and nearly fiber-free, the texture is exceptionally smooth and velvety. Every bite bursts with rich sweetness and lingering tropical fragrance.
甜度出众却层次分明，既有成熟芒果的浓郁，又带一丝自然清新的回甘，让人一试难忘。无论是直接享用，还是制作甜品与果饮，都能展现其卓越品质。
Remarkably sweet yet well-balanced, it offers a rich, full-bodied mango flavor with a refreshing finish. Perfect for enjoying fresh or elevating desserts and beverages, it represents mango at its finest.
这不仅是一颗芒果，更是一场关于香甜与质地的极致体验。
More than just a mango — it’s a luxurious tropical experience in every bite.

name: 一箱空运秘鲁太阳之子芒果｜树上完熟·极致香甜·无纤维丝滑果肉 Air-Flown Peruvian “Sun Child” Mango | Tree-Ripened · Ultra Sweet · Fiber-Free Silky Flesh
category: 新鲜水果
description:
【商品介绍 | Product Description】
来自秘鲁阳光沃土的“太阳之子芒果”，以近乎苛刻的标准甄选，只为呈现芒果中的巅峰风味。果实在树上自然成熟，顺势蒂落后即刻空运锁鲜，最大程度保留原始甜度与香气。
Sourced from the sun-drenched lands of Peru, the “Sun Child” mango is carefully selected to deliver the pinnacle of mango flavor. Each fruit is naturally tree-ripened and harvested at perfect maturity, then air-flown to preserve its peak sweetness and aroma.
其果皮极薄，轻轻一剥即可露出金黄诱人的果肉；肉质厚实饱满，几乎无纤维，入口如丝绸般顺滑细腻。每一口都饱含阳光的甜润，多汁而不腻，香气浓郁持久。
With its ultra-thin skin, it peels effortlessly to reveal luscious golden flesh. Thick, juicy, and nearly fiber-free, the texture is exceptionally smooth and velvety. Every bite bursts with rich sweetness and lingering tropical fragrance.
甜度出众却层次分明，既有成熟芒果的浓郁，又带一丝自然清新的回甘，让人一试难忘。无论是直接享用，还是制作甜品与果饮，都能展现其卓越品质。
Remarkably sweet yet well-balanced, it offers a rich, full-bodied mango flavor with a refreshing finish. Perfect for enjoying fresh or elevating desserts and beverages, it represents mango at its finest.
这不仅是一颗芒果，更是一场关于香甜与质地的极致体验。
More than just a mango — it’s a luxurious tropical experience in every bite.

name: 马来西亚黑刺榴莲｜稀世黑钻·极致浓香·顶级珍稀之选 Malaysian Black Thorn Durian | Rare “Black Diamond” · Intensely Rich · Ultra-Premium Selection
category: 新鲜水果
description:
【商品介绍 | Product Description】
稀罕如金，锋芒暗藏。
黑刺榴莲，被誉为榴莲界的“黑钻石”，全球产量不足猫山王的1%，仅生长于马来西亚北部极少数珍稀庄园。其名字源自果底标志性的星状黑刺，如同暗夜王冠，在低调之中流露出无法忽视的尊贵气息。
Rare as gold, with a quiet edge of brilliance.
Known as the “Black Diamond” of durians, Black Thorn is extraordinarily scarce, with a global yield of less than 1% of Musang King. It thrives only in select estates in northern Malaysia. Its name comes from the signature star-shaped black thorn at its base, resembling a crown in the night—subtle yet undeniably regal.
「味觉的暴烈与温柔」
入口瞬间，是直击感官的浓烈冲击——厚重的奶油质感与高糖度带来爆发式的香甜；随之而来，是层层递进的复杂风味，微苦、焦糖与酒香交织，最终化为细腻悠长的回甘。
“A Symphony of Intensity and Elegance”
The first bite delivers a bold, explosive richness—luxuriously creamy with an intense sweetness that fills the palate. It then unfolds into complex layers of flavor, hints of bitterness, caramel, and a subtle fermented note, finishing with a refined, lingering sweetness.
其果肉色泽深金偏橙，质地细腻如凝脂，柔软却富有结构感，每一口都如在味蕾上缓缓融化。浓而不腻，烈而不燥，展现出榴莲风味中少见的平衡与深度。
Its flesh glows in a deep golden-orange hue, smooth and custard-like, soft yet structured. Rich but never overwhelming, intense yet perfectly balanced, it represents one of the most sophisticated expressions of durian.
这不是普通的榴莲，而是一种只属于少数人的味觉珍藏。
This is not just a durian—it is a rare indulgence reserved for true connoisseurs.

name: 新鲜天然真鲷鱼柳刺身｜Fresh Wild Madai Fillet (Sashimi Grade)｜白身鱼之王·清甜回甘·Omakase同款
category: 限量日本空运新鲜刺身级精选鱼柳Sashimi ｜Limited Fresh Sashimi-Grade Fish Fillets
unit: Approx. 0.5-0.7lb each | Price per0.5 lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
真鲷（真鯛 / Madai）被誉为日式白身鱼之王，是Omakase白身位的经典主角。
 天然野生真鲷肉质细嫩紧致、鲜甜清爽，入口回甘干净。
 本品为新鲜真鲷鱼柳，去骨更方便，适合 厚切刺身、握寿司、昆布締め、鲷鱼茶泡饭 等多种高级日式吃法，在家也能轻松复刻寿司店级体验。🐟✨
产品亮点
天然野生 Wild：风味更干净清爽
真鲷鱼柳：去骨省心，料理更方便
口感：细嫩紧致、清甜回甘
用途：刺身/寿司、昆布締め、茶泡饭、清蒸
4) ✅ Omakase推荐吃法（真鲷三件套）
① 厚切刺身（最推荐✅）
厚切 0.8–1.2cm
 搭配：海盐 + 酢橘/柚子
真鲷的高级感来自“清甜回甘”，越简单越贵。
② 握寿司（Nigiri）
轻刷昆布酱油（Nikkiri）
 点少许山葵
真鲷握寿司是“基本功”，也是最经典那口。
③ 昆布締め（Komujime）高级玩法
用昆布包裹短时间熟成
 旨味提升、口感更细
直接变Omakase同款风味。
5) ✅ Omakase摆盘步骤（专业SOP）
【Omakase 真鲷（Madai）出餐流程】
低温保鲜：0–4°C冷藏
回温：切片前回温 2–3分钟（甜味更明显）
切法：顺纹理斜切（口感更嫩）
摆盘底：紫苏叶 + 白萝卜丝
调味：
首选：海盐 + 酢橘/柚子
备选：昆布酱油轻点
点睛：柚子皮屑/木芽少许
定位：Omakase白身鱼位（清爽收口）

Fresh Wild Madai Fillet (Sashimi Grade) is a premium Japanese white fish known as the “king of sea bream.” Clean sweetness, firm yet tender texture, and a refined umami finish. Perfect for thick-cut sashimi, nigiri sushi, kombu-jime curing, and tai chazuke (sea bream tea rice). A true omakase staple.
Key Features
Wild-caught Japanese Red Sea Bream (Madai)
Taste: clean sweetness, delicate umami
Texture: firm, tender, refreshing
Best for: sashimi, sushi, kombu-jime, chazuke
Omakase Tip
Serve with sea salt + citrus to highlight natural sweetness. Use minimal soy sauce for a refined finish.

name: 蜜柑鯛去骨鱼柳｜柑橘饲料养殖 · 清香无腥（刺身级） Uminoya Premium Mikan-dai Fillet | Citrus-Fed, Clean & Fresh (Sashimi Grade)
category: 限量日本空运新鲜刺身级精选鱼柳Sashimi ｜Limited Fresh Sashimi-Grade Fish Fillets
unit: 约0.5-0.7lb｜0.5lb单价｜以实重结算 Approx. 0.5-0.7lb each | Price per0.5 lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
日本蜜柑鲷（みかん鯛 / Mikan-dai）是日本知名的柑橘系品牌真鲷，采用蜜柑（柑橘）相关饲料调理养殖，使鱼肉风味更干净、腥味更低，甜味更自然突出。此款为鱼柳（Fillet）刺身级规格，肉质紧致弹嫩、切面透亮，非常适合刺身、寿司及Omakase料理出品。
蜜柑鲷的脂香更清爽、不厚重，入口鲜甜回甘，特别适合喜欢“干净鲜味”的白身鱼爱好者，也是日料店常用的高端真鲷选择之一。
口感风味
清爽鲜甜，回甘明显
腥味低，脂香干净不腻
肉质紧实弹嫩，细腻顺口
产品亮点
✅ 刺身级鱼柳：开封即可料理，方便出品
✅ 柑橘饲料调理：风味更干净，腥味更低
✅ 肉质紧实：适合切片刺身与寿司握
✅ Omakase常用：日料店同款白身鱼柳
✅ 料理百搭：刺身/寿司/炙烧/鲷茶渍都优秀
推荐吃法
刺身（推荐）｜寿司｜轻炙烧（Aburi）｜昆布締め｜鲷茶渍｜盐烧
 Omakase摆盘步骤（专业SOP）
【Omakase 蜜柑鯛（Mikan-dai）出餐流程】
低温保鲜：0–4°C冷藏
切片前回温：2–3分钟（甜味更突出）
切法：顺纹理斜切，厚切更显高级
摆盘底：紫苏叶 + 白萝卜丝
调味（建议更清爽）：
首选：海盐 + 柑橘（酢橘/柚子）
备选：昆布酱油轻点
点睛：少许柚子皮屑/木芽
定位：Omakase白身位（清爽、收口干净）
Chef小贴士：蜜柑鯛别用重酱油，清爽调味才最能放大“柑橘饲养”的优势。

保存建议
冷藏保存 0–4°C，建议尽快食用以保持最佳风味。

Japanese Mikan-dai (みかん鯛 / Mikan-dai) is a premium citrus-fed red sea bream known for its cleaner flavor, natural sweetness, and minimal fishiness. Raised on a citrus-inspired diet, Mikan-dai delivers a refined taste with a light, elegant fat profile.
This sashimi-grade fillet features firm yet tender flesh with a beautifully translucent cut, making it perfect for sashimi, sushi, and omakase presentations. A favorite for those who love clean, delicate white-fish flavors with a sweet, umami-rich finish.
Taste Profile
Clean, mildly sweet finish
Low fishiness with refined, light fat
Firm yet delicate texture
Key Highlights
✅ Sashimi-grade fillet: convenient and ready to serve
✅ Citrus-fed refinement: cleaner flavor, less odor
✅ Firm & translucent flesh: ideal for slicing sashimi and sushi
✅ Omakase favorite: restaurant-grade white fish fillet
✅ Versatile use: sashimi, sushi, aburi, tai chazuke, grilling
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Aburi (Light Seared) | Kombu-jime | Tai Chazuke | Shioyaki (Salt-Grilled)
Storage
Keep refrigerated at 0–4°C and enjoy as soon as possible for peak freshness.

category: ① 先付・前菜  Zensai / Appetizers 开胃清爽的起点，从轻盈的味道唤醒味蕾，为整套Omakase铺陈出第一段节奏
description:
日本 Icefish 刺身（小银鱼 / 白饭鱼），日文称 白魚（しらうお / Shirauo），是日本料理中极具代表性的季节性珍味。鱼体晶莹半透明，口感细嫩柔滑，几乎没有腥味，以其极致清甜与纯净风味而闻名。
在Omakase中，Icefish常作为前菜或白身段的点睛食材，用于刺身或轻拌呈现，突出“鲜度本身”。入口即化般的质地，搭配少量酱油、蛋黄或醋橙，层次立刻展开，是懂吃客人非常偏爱的细腻型食材。
口感风味
口感： 极其柔嫩、顺滑细腻
风味： 清甜纯净、无杂味
余韵： 轻盈爽口，干净收尾
产品亮点
✅ 日本季节限定珍味：小众高端，供应期短
✅ 刺身级品质：强调鲜度与处理
✅ 风味极其干净：几乎无腥味
✅ Omakase常用前菜：用于打开味蕾
✅ 高辨识度食材：视觉与口感都非常日式
推荐吃法
刺身（推荐）｜轻拌蛋黄｜酱油/醋橙｜作为Omakase前菜呈现
保存方式：
冷藏：0–4°C 保存，建议尽快食用风味最佳
冷冻：如为冷冻刺身，保持冷冻保存，避免反复解冻
解冻建议（刺身级）：
建议 冷藏低温缓慢解冻（约 6–12 小时，视包装与份量）
解冻后轻轻沥干水分，保持口感与清爽甜味
解冻后建议当日食用

Japanese Icefish (Shirauo) Sashimi is a highly prized seasonal delicacy in Japanese cuisine. Known for its crystal-clear, translucent appearance, icefish delivers an exceptionally clean, delicate sweetness with an ultra-soft, melt-in-your-mouth texture.
In omakase dining, icefish is often served as an opening appetizer or early white-fish course, highlighting freshness and purity. Lightly seasoned with soy sauce, egg yolk, or citrus, it offers a refined and elegant experience favored by discerning diners.
Taste Profile
Texture: ultra-tender, silky smooth
Flavor: clean sweetness with no fishiness
Finish: light, refreshing, and crisp
Key Highlights
✅ Seasonal Japanese delicacy with limited availability
✅ Sashimi-grade quality emphasizing freshness
✅ Extremely clean and delicate flavor
✅ Popular as an omakase appetizer or early course
✅ Visually striking, highly refined ingredient
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Lightly seasoned with soy sauce or citrus | Egg yolk pairing | Omakase appetizer

description:
针鱼（サヨリ / Sayori）是日本料理中非常受欢迎的清爽型白身鱼。
 鱼肉细嫩紧致、清甜回甘，油脂清爽不腻，海味干净。
 适合做 刺身、握寿司、昆布締め、盐烧/轻煎，也是Omakase里非常经典的“清爽白身位/过渡位”食材。🐟✨
产品亮点
日料经典鱼种：寿司店常见
口感：细嫩紧致、清甜回甘
风味：海味干净，清爽不腻
用途：刺身/寿司、昆布締め、盐烧、轻煎
4) ✅ Omakase推荐吃法（针鱼最出彩的3种）
① 刺身（最推荐✅）
斜切薄片 0.5–0.8cm
 搭配：海盐 + 柑橘（酢橘/柚子）
清甜更突出，余韵更干净。
② 握寿司（Nigiri）
轻刷昆布酱油（Nikkiri）
 点少许山葵
口感清爽，是很高级的白身位。
③ 盐烧（居酒屋经典）
撒盐轻烤/轻煎
 外皮微焦，内里细嫩
简单却很香，家庭快手必备。
5) ✅ Omakase摆盘步骤
【Omakase Sayori 出餐流程】
低温保鲜 0–4°C
切片前回温 1–2分钟（甜味更明显）
斜切薄片，保持纹理
紫苏叶 + 白萝卜丝打底
少量盐/柑橘或酱油轻点
点睛：柚子皮屑/细葱少许
定位：Omakase清爽白身位 / 过渡位

Fresh Sayori (Japanese Halfbeak) is a popular Japanese white fish known for its clean sweetness and tender, refined texture. Light, refreshing, and delicate. Perfect for sashimi, nigiri sushi, kombu-jime curing, or simple salt-grilling.
Key Features
Classic Japanese sushi fish
Taste: clean sweetness, refreshing finish
Texture: tender yet firm bite
Best for: sashimi, sushi, grilled
Omakase Tip
Serve with sea salt + citrus to highlight its natural sweetness.

description:
蜜柑鯛（みかん鯛）是日本人气特色品牌真鲷，以“清甜干净、带淡淡柑橘清香”著称。
 肉质细嫩紧致、鲜味纯净，入口回甘悠长。非常适合做刺身、握寿司、鲷鱼茶泡饭，也可清蒸或涮锅，风味清爽不腻。🍊🐟
产品亮点
特色品牌鱼：日本蜜柑鯛（Mikan-dai）
风味特点：清甜回甘，带淡淡柑橘清香
口感：紧致细嫩、鲜味干净
推荐吃法：刺身/寿司/茶泡饭/涮锅/清蒸
✅ Omakase 推荐吃法
① 刺身厚切（最推荐）✅
厚切 0.8–1.2cm
 搭配建议：盐 + 酢橘/柚子（最能提现“蜜柑感”）
② 握寿司（Nigiri）
轻刷昆布酱油（Nikkiri）
 点缀柚子皮屑/细葱少许
③ 鲷鱼茶泡饭（Tai Chazuke）
蜜柑鯛薄片铺热饭
 淋热高汤/焙茶，撒海苔芝麻
清香与回甘会更温柔、很高级。
4) ✅ Omakase 刺身摆盘步骤
【Omakase Fresh Mikan-dai 出餐流程】
低温保鲜：保持冰鲜，出餐前回温 2–3 分钟
切法：顺纹理切片（更嫩更甜）
摆盘底：紫苏叶 + 白萝卜丝
调味建议（克制更高级）：
首选：盐 + 酢橘/柚子汁
备选：昆布酱油轻刷
点睛：柚子皮屑/木芽少许
配菜：腌姜、渍物（少量）
Chef小贴士：蜜柑鯛本身味道干净，不要重酱油，用盐和柑橘更显贵。

Fresh Mikan-dai (Japanese Citrus Sea Bream) is a premium branded sea bream known for its clean sweetness and subtle citrus aroma.
 Firm yet tender with a refined umami finish. Ideal for sashimi, nigiri sushi, tai chazuke (sea bream tea rice), hot pot, or gentle steaming.
Key Features
Type: Japanese branded sea bream (Mikan-dai)
Taste: clean sweetness, subtle citrus aroma
Texture: firm, tender, refined white fish
Best for: sashimi, sushi, chazuke, hot pot, steaming
Omakase Tip
Serve with sea salt and citrus (yuzu/sudachi) to highlight the signature aroma. Avoid heavy soy sauce.

 可做 刺身、握寿司、昆布締め、鲷鱼茶泡饭，也可清蒸、盐烤或涮锅，是Omakase与家庭餐桌都极受欢迎的经典食材。🐟✨

Japanese Red Sea Bream (Madai) is one of the most iconic white fish in Japanese cuisine.
 Known for its clean sweetness, firm yet tender texture, and elegant finish. Perfect for sashimi, nigiri sushi, kombu-jime curing, tai chazuke (sea bream tea rice), steaming, grilling, or hot pot.
Key Features
Taste: clean sweetness, delicate umami
Texture: firm, tender, refreshing
Best for: sashimi, sushi, kombu-jime, chazuke, steaming, grilling, hot pot
Omakase Tip
Serve with sea salt + citrus to highlight natural sweetness. Use minimal soy sauce for a refined finish.

Product Name: Golden Threadfin Bream (Itoyoridai)
 Golden Threadfin Bream is known for its elegant golden stripes and delicate white flesh. It delivers a clean, mildly sweet flavor with a tender, flaky texture and minimal fishiness. A favorite in Japanese cuisine, it is highly versatile and perfect for both home cooking and restaurant-quality dishes. Best enjoyed through steaming, salt-grilling (shioyaki), teriyaki, karaage (fried), or light soups.
Key Highlights:
✅ Tender, delicate white flesh

✅ Versatile cooking: steam/grill/pan-fry/deep-fry/soup
✅ Popular in Japanese restaurants
Recommended Cooking Methods: Steaming | Shioyaki | Teriyaki | Karaage | Miso Soup / Clear Soup

Farmed Isaki (Nagasaki, Japan) is a premium Japanese white fish known for its delicate sweetness and refined fat. Nagasaki farmed isaki offers stable quality and a rich yet clean finish. Ideal for sashimi, nigiri sushi, lightly seared skin (aburi), salt-grilling, or steaming.

description:
金目鯛（キンメダイ / Kinmedai）是日本高端白身鱼中的“油脂王者”，以其脂香浓郁、口感细嫩、甜味与旨味层次强而闻名。此款为千叶胜浦产「地キンメ」并带产地标签（Tag付き），代表更严格的产地认证与高品质流通标准，属于寿司店与Omakase餐厅争相采购的高级货。
Kinmedai的魅力在于：油脂丰厚但细腻不腻，切片刺身口感柔滑，轻炙烧后脂香被瞬间激发，香气更立体，余韵悠长，是中后段最能拉升“高级感”的明星鱼。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，金目鯛通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑤步：浓郁主角段（Rich Feature Fish）
 经常安排在中后段作为“油脂高潮”代表，尤其以Aburi炙金目最经典，推动整套菜单进入风味高点。
口感风味
油脂丰厚但细腻，入口即化
甜味明显，鲜味浓郁
炙烧后香气爆发，余韵悠长
产品亮点
✅ 千叶胜浦地金目：本地高端产区代表
✅ Tag付き产地认证：流通标准更高，品质更稳定
✅ 高脂白身鱼王者：脂香浓、层次足
✅ Omakase主角：中后段浓郁担当，出品高级
✅ 炙烧表现极佳：Aburi最经典、最能体现香气
推荐吃法
轻炙烧（推荐）｜刺身｜寿司｜盐烧｜煮付（Nitsuke）｜西京渍

Kinmedai (Golden Eye Snapper) is one of Japan’s most prized premium white fish, famous for its rich buttery fat, delicate texture, and deep sweet umami. This selection is a “Ji-Kinme” (local premium Kinmedai) from Katsuura, Chiba, and comes tagged (Tagged / Traceable)—a strong indicator of verified origin and high handling standards sought after by top sushi bars.
Kinmedai is luxuriously rich yet refined. Served as sashimi it is silky and sweet, and when lightly seared (aburi) its aroma and buttery sweetness intensify dramatically, creating an elegant long finish.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, Kinmedai is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑤ – Rich Feature Fish (Peak Richness Stage)
 Often placed in later courses as a signature rich highlight—aburi kinmedai is a classic omakase centerpiece.
Taste Profile
Buttery rich fat, melt-in-your-mouth texture
Pronounced sweetness and deep umami
Aromatic, long luxurious finish (especially aburi)
Key Highlights
✅ Premium Ji-Kinme from Katsuura, Chiba
✅ Tagged / traceable origin for quality assurance
✅ One of Japan’s most luxurious rich white fish
✅ Omakase favorite for later-course highlight
✅ Perfect for aburi, sashimi, grilling, simmered dishes
Best For
Aburi (Recommended) | Sashimi | Sushi | Grilled | Nitsuke (Simmered) | Saikyo-yaki

name: 比目鱼｜清爽轻盈 · 开场之选（刺身级） Halibut | Light & Elegant Starter (Sashimi Grade)
category: ② 白身鱼  White Fish 细腻清透，味道干净纯粹。以最本真的鲜味展开，让味觉在不经意间被打开
unit: Approx. 3-4 lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
Halibut（サメガレイ / Samegarei）属于比目鱼类高级白身鱼，以其肉质细嫩、清甜干净的风味而广受寿司店与Omakase料理青睐。切面细致透亮，入口柔滑，甜味轻盈、旨味细长，非常适合作为Omakase前段白身鱼出品，用来呈现“鲜度与刀工”的细节。
相比油脂更厚重的鱼种，Halibut风味更清爽，几乎没有腥味，尤其适合做刺身、寿司、昆布締め或轻炙烧表现层次。
口感风味
细嫩柔滑，口感干净
清甜淡雅，旨味细长
低腥清爽，余韵轻盈
产品亮点
✅ 高级白身鱼代表：清甜细腻、味道干净
✅ 刺身寿司推荐：切片质感好，卖相高级
✅ Omakase常用白身：适合开场与前段节奏
✅ 料理百搭：刺身/寿司/昆布締め/轻炙烧都好吃
推荐吃法
刺身（推荐）｜寿司｜昆布締め｜轻炙烧｜清蒸/盐烧

Overview
Japanese Halibut (Samegarei) is a premium white fish prized in sushi bars and omakase dining for its clean sweetness and delicate, smooth texture. With a beautifully refined grain and translucent cut, it delivers gentle umami and a light, elegant finish, making it ideal for early-course white fish presentations.
Compared to richer fish, halibut is lighter and cleaner with minimal fishiness, perfect for sashimi, sushi, kombu-jime, or a light sear (aburi) to enhance aroma.
Taste Profile
Delicate, smooth, clean texture
Light natural sweetness with refined umami
Minimal fishiness and crisp finish
Key Highlights
✅ Premium white fish with clean sweetness
✅ Perfect for sashimi and sushi presentation
✅ Omakase favorite for early-course white fish
✅ Versatile: sashimi, kombu-jime, aburi, steaming/grilling
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Kombu-jime | Aburi (Light Seared) | Steamed/Grilled

name: 赤甘鲷｜松笠烧风味 · 外脆内嫩（刺身级） Akamadai | Matsukasa Style, Crispy Skin & Tender Flesh
category: ② 白身鱼  White Fish 细腻清透，味道干净纯粹。以最本真的鲜味展开，让味觉在不经意间被打开
unit: Approx. 2-2.5 lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
赤甘鲷（赤甘鯛 / Akamadai）是日本高端白身鱼代表之一，因肉质细嫩、甜味突出、香气优雅而广受寿司店与Omakase料理青睐。此款为长崎对马产手钓（手釣り）赤甘鲷，钓获鱼通常压力更小、肉质更紧实，风味更干净细腻。
赤甘鲷的特点是“甜味更明显、脂香细致不腻”，切成刺身时口感柔嫩细滑，轻炙烧后香气更集中，尤其适合做Omakase中的高级白身主角。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase中，赤甘鲷通常属于：
 ✅ 第②步：中段白身/轻脂段（Textural White Fish / Light Fat）
 通常安排在真鲷、比目鱼之后，用更明显的甜味与细致油脂承接前段，逐步走向更浓郁的风味。
口感风味
甜味突出，鲜味细致
肉质细嫩带弹性，口感高级
香气优雅，余韵回甘明显
产品亮点
✅ 长崎对马产：优质海域，风味干净
✅ 手钓（手釣り）：肉质更紧实、品质更佳
✅ 高端白身鱼代表：甜味明显、香气优雅
✅ Omakase常用：适合刺身/寿司/轻炙烧
✅ 料理百搭：昆布締め、盐烧也非常出色
推荐吃法
刺身（推荐）｜寿司｜轻炙烧（Aburi）｜昆布締め｜盐烧

Akamadai (Red Tilefish) is one of Japan’s most prized premium white fish, known for its elegant aroma, delicate texture, and naturally sweet finish. This fresh, line-caught Akamadai from Tsushima, Nagasaki is especially valued for its cleaner flavor and firmer texture, making it a favorite among sushi bars and omakase restaurants.
Akamadai offers a refined, lightly rich profile—sweet, silky, and never heavy. It shines as sashimi, and becomes even more aromatic when lightly seared (aburi), making it a signature white fish in premium omakase.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, Akamadai is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ② – Mid-Course White Fish / Light Fat (Textural White Fish)
 Often placed after lighter white fish (hirame/madai) as the course transitions into deeper sweetness and refined richness.
Taste Profile
Naturally sweet with refined umami
Delicate yet slightly springy texture
Elegant aroma with a clean lingering finish
Key Highlights
✅ Fresh from Tsushima, Nagasaki (Japan)
✅ Line-caught for premium quality and clean flavor
✅ Premium white fish with elegant sweetness
✅ Ideal for sashimi, sushi, aburi, kombu-jime
✅ Omakase favorite mid-course selection
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Aburi (Light Seared) | Kombu-jime | Salt-Grilled

name: 明石鯛｜明石产 · 高级真鲷（刺身级） Akashi-dai | Akashi-Origin Premium Sea Bream
category: ② 白身鱼  White Fish 细腻清透，味道干净纯粹。以最本真的鲜味展开，让味觉在不经意间被打开
unit: Approx. 3-4 lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
明石鲷（明石鯛 / Akashi-dai）是日本料理中最具代表性的高端真鲷产地品牌之一，来自瀬戸内海（Setouchi Inland Sea）优质海域。由于水流与海域环境的影响，明石鲷以肉质紧实、甜味清爽、旨味细长而闻名，是寿司店与Omakase料理中极受欢迎的“白身鱼王者”。
作为经典真鲷，明石鲷的优势在于“干净、细腻、有层次”。无论是刺身、寿司握，还是做成昆布締め、轻熟成，都能展现出非常高级的香气与回甘。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，明石鲷通常属于：
 ✅ 第①步：开场白身鱼（Delicate White Fish）
 常用于前段建立清甜基调，突出鲜度与刀工，是白身段的核心主角之一。
口感风味
肉质紧实细嫩，口感高级
清甜回甘明显，旨味细长
风味干净，海味纯净不腥
产品亮点
✅ 瀬戸内海名产地：明石鲷代表品质与口碑
✅ 真鲷中的高端选择：清甜干净、层次细腻
✅ Omakase常用白身核心：适合开场与前段主角
✅ 刺身寿司表现优秀：切面漂亮、口感紧致
✅ 料理手法兼容：昆布締め/轻熟成/轻炙烧都适合
推荐吃法
刺身（推荐）｜寿司｜昆布締め｜轻熟成｜轻炙烧｜盐烧

Akashi-dai (Akashi Sea Bream / Madai) is one of Japan’s most iconic premium madai selections, sourced from the pristine waters of the Setouchi Inland Sea. Known for its firm refined texture, clean sweetness, and long elegant umami finish, Akashi-dai is highly valued by sushi bars and omakase restaurants as a flagship early-course white fish.
It excels as sashimi and sushi, and also performs beautifully with techniques like kombu-jime or light aging, enhancing its natural sweetness and depth.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, Akashi-dai is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ① – Early Course White Fish (Delicate White Fish)
 Often featured near the beginning to establish a clean, sweet baseline and highlight knife work and freshness.
Taste Profile
Firm yet delicate texture
Clean sweetness with a long umami finish
Pure ocean flavor with minimal fishiness
Key Highlights
✅ Premium madai from the Setouchi Inland Sea
✅ Clean, sweet flavor with refined umami
✅ Core early-course white fish for omakase
✅ Excellent for sashimi, sushi, kombu-jime, light aging
✅ Beautiful presentation and texture
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Kombu-jime | Light Aging | Aburi | Salt-Grilled

name: 大竹荚鱼 縞鰺｜细腻脂香 · 高端之选（刺身级） Shimaaji | Delicate, Lightly Fatty & Premium (Sashimi Grade)
category: ③ 银皮鱼  Silver Skin Fish 风味逐渐提升，带有微妙的酸香与层次变化，让整体节奏开始变得更有性格
unit: Approx. 2.5–3.5 lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
縞鰺（しまあじ / Shimaaji，大竹荚鱼）是日本寿司店与Omakase料理中非常受欢迎的高级鱼种，以其肉质脆弹、油脂清爽、风味干净著称。相比普通竹荚鱼，Shimaaji品质更细腻、香气更优雅，入口先是紧实弹牙，随后带出轻柔甜味与细致旨味，是“懂吃客”的必点鱼。
Shimaaji通常作为从清淡白身向更浓郁风味过渡的关键鱼种，能让整套Omakase节奏更顺、更高级。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，Shimaaji通常属于：
 ✅ 第②步：中段白身/轻脂段（Textural White Fish / Light Fat）
 一般安排在真鲷、比目鱼等清爽白身之后，用更明显的口感弹性与细致油脂承接前段，为后续银皮鱼与红身鱼做铺垫。
口感风味
肉质脆弹，口感紧实
油脂清爽不腻，海味干净
甜味细致，旨味回甘明显
产品亮点
✅ 高级鱼种代表：寿司店/Omakase常见人气款
✅ 脆弹口感：识别度高，越嚼越香
✅ 轻脂清爽：不厚重，风味干净
✅ 过渡鱼“桥梁位”：从白身→浓郁风味的关键步骤
✅ 刺身寿司表现优秀：切面漂亮、出品高级
推荐吃法
刺身（推荐）｜寿司｜轻炙烧（Aburi）｜昆布締め｜盐烧

Shimaaji (Striped Jack) is a premium favorite in sushi bars and omakase dining, prized for its crisp, springy bite, clean ocean flavor, and refined, balanced fat. Compared to regular aji (horse mackerel), shimaaji offers a more elegant aroma, firmer texture, and a gentle sweetness that builds into a lingering umami finish.
It’s a classic “bridge fish” in omakase, smoothly transitioning the course from delicate white fish into richer flavors.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, shimaaji is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ② – Mid-Course White Fish / Light Fat (Textural White Fish)
 Often placed after delicate white fish (hirame/madai), introducing a firmer bite and refined fat before moving into hikari-mono and richer courses.
Taste Profile
Crisp, firm, springy texture
Clean, balanced fat (not heavy)
Gentle sweetness with refined umami finish
Key Highlights
✅ Premium sushi & omakase favorite
✅ Signature crisp bite and firm texture
✅ Clean flavor with refined fat
✅ Perfect bridge fish in omakase progression
✅ Excellent for sashimi, sushi, aburi, kombu-jime
Best For
Sashimi (Recommended) | Sushi | Aburi | Kombu-jime | Grilled

name: 沙丁鱼｜脂香清爽 · 风味突出（刺身级） Iwashi | Lightly Fatty & Flavorful (Sashimi Grade)
category: ③ 银皮鱼  Silver Skin Fish 风味逐渐提升，带有微妙的酸香与层次变化，让整体节奏开始变得更有性格
description:
沙丁鱼（イワシ / Iwashi）是日式寿司与Omakase中非常经典的“光物（Hikari-mono 银皮鱼）”代表，以其油脂香气、鲜味浓郁、旨味爆发而深受老饕喜爱。新鲜Iwashi处理得当几乎没有腥味，反而带出迷人的甜脂与海味层次，是一口就能记住的风味型寿司。
在Omakase节奏里，Iwashi通常作为“转折点”，用更浓郁的香气与油脂把口味从清爽白身带向更深层次，是懂行寿司店非常重要的一贯。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，Iwashi通常属于：
 ✅ 第③步：光物银皮鱼（Hikari-mono）转折段
 一般安排在白身鱼与中段鱼之后，用香气与油脂做“换频道”，为后续金枪鱼、浓郁主角做铺垫。
口感风味
油脂香浓，鲜味爆发
旨味层次强，余韵明显
处理得当风味很干净
产品亮点
✅ 光物核心鱼种：银皮鱼代表，寿司经典
✅ 香气与油脂表现强：一口记忆点很足
✅ Omakase转折位：提升节奏，带入浓郁风味
✅ 适合寿司/醋渍：日本料理标准做法
推荐吃法
寿司（推荐）｜醋渍（Shime）｜刺身｜葱姜搭配｜轻炙烧（可选）
 ✅ Omakase/日料上桌建议（整鱼位）
【Omakase Whole Iwashi 出餐建议】
Yakimono 烤物位：盐烤整鱼 + 萝卜泥 + 酢橘
Nimono 煮物位：梅煮/味噌煮整鱼，汁收得亮一点更高级
Kozara 小皿位：南蛮渍冷盘，开胃解腻
Chef小贴士：整鱼处理好“去腥三件套”= 盐 + 姜 + 柑橘/醋。

Overview
Iwashi (Japanese Sardine) is a classic and beloved fish in sushi and omakase, categorized as hikari-mono (silver-skinned fish). Known for its rich natural fat, deep umami, and aromatic flavor, properly handled fresh iwashi tastes clean and refined with a beautifully savory finish—an iconic bite for true sushi lovers.
In omakase, iwashi often serves as a “turning point,” transitioning the meal from delicate white fish into deeper, richer flavors.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, iwashi is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ③ – Hikari-mono (Silver-Skinned Fish) Transition Course
 Often placed after white fish to introduce more aroma and richness before moving into tuna and later highlights.
Taste Profile
Rich, fatty, highly aromatic
Deep umami with a lingering finish
Clean taste when properly handled
Key Highlights
✅ Classic sushi favorite (hikari-mono category)
✅ Rich fat and intense umami
✅ Key transition fish in omakase progression
✅ Perfect for sushi and shime (vinegar-cured) style
Best For
Sushi (Recommended) | Shime (Vinegar-Cured) | Sashimi | Ginger & scallion pairing | Optional light sear

name: 鲭鱼｜脂香浓郁 · 醋腌平衡（刺身级） Saba | Rich & Fatty, Balanced with Vinegar (Sashimi Grade)
category: ③ 银皮鱼  Silver Skin Fish 风味逐渐提升，带有微妙的酸香与层次变化，让整体节奏开始变得更有性格
unit: Approx. 1.6-2.3lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
真サバ（真鲭 / 鯖 / Ma-saba）是日本寿司与Omakase中极具代表性的“光物（Hikari-mono 银皮鱼）”。特点是油脂香气浓郁、旨味强、层次鲜明，是很多老饕最爱的寿司鱼之一。
真鲭对处理要求极高，正确处理后风味反而非常干净，常见做法为醋渍（しめ鯖 Shime Saba），能够突出油脂的甜香并让口感更紧致爽口。入口先是脂香与鲜味爆发，随后带出醋香与回甘，是Omakase中非常重要的一贯“节奏转折点”。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，真サバ通常属于：
 ✅ 第③步：光物银皮鱼（Hikari-mono）转折段
 一般安排在白身鱼之后，用更强的香气与油脂切换节奏，为后续金枪鱼与浓郁主角做铺垫。
口感风味
油脂香浓，旨味爆发
醋渍后更紧致爽口，风味更高级
余韵明显，记忆点极强
产品亮点
✅ 光物代表：银皮鱼经典，寿司必备
✅ 脂香浓、层次强：一口立刻有存在感
✅ 醋渍（Shime）最佳：最日式、最经典
✅ Omakase关键转折位：从清爽走向浓郁
✅ 老饕必点：懂吃客非常爱
推荐吃法
醋渍寿司（推荐）｜寿司｜刺身（熟练处理）｜葱姜搭配｜轻炙烧（可选）

✅ 3种最经典吃法
① 盐烤真サバ（最推荐✅最香）
表面撒盐静置 10 分钟 → 烤/煎至金黄
 配：萝卜泥 + 酢橘/柠檬
这就是日本定食店的“招牌烤鱼”。
② 味噌煮（浓郁下饭）
味噌 + 酱油 + 味醂 + 清酒
 加姜片去腥 → 小火焖煮
鲭鱼油脂遇味噌，鲜到“拌三碗饭”。
③ しめ鯖（醋渍鲭鱼）/寿司店经典
盐腌 → 醋渍 → 切片
酸香解腻，鲜味更集中。
4) ✅ Omakase/日料出餐建议（青鱼位）
【Omakase Saba 出餐思路】
Yakimono 烤物位：盐烤 + 萝卜泥 + 酢橘
Nimono 煮物位：味噌煮（姜片必备）
Sushi 青鱼位（仅刺身级）：しめ鯖，配姜片/葱花
Chef小贴士：真鲭鱼鲜味强，搭配“姜、柑橘、醋”会更干净、更高级。


Ma-saba (True Saba Mackerel) is one of the most iconic hikari-mono (silver-skinned fish) in sushi and omakase dining. Loved for its rich natural fat, bold umami, and aromatic depth, saba delivers an unforgettable bite when properly handled.
A classic preparation is Shime Saba (vinegar-cured mackerel), which tightens the texture and highlights its sweet fat while keeping the flavor clean and refined. In an omakase course, saba acts as a key “turning point,” shifting the palate from delicate white fish into deeper, richer flavors.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, ma-saba is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ③ – Hikari-mono (Silver-Skinned Fish) Transition Course
 Commonly placed after white fish to introduce richer aroma and umami before moving into tuna and later highlights.
Taste Profile
Rich, fatty, aromatic
Deep umami with bright shime finish
Long, bold lingering aftertaste
Key Highlights
✅ Classic hikari-mono sushi favorite
✅ Rich fat and bold umami
✅ Best enjoyed as Shime Saba
✅ Key transition fish in omakase progression
✅ Loved by true sushi enthusiasts
Best For
Shime Saba (Recommended) | Sushi | Sashimi (properly handled) | Ginger pairing | Optional light sear

name: 小竹荚鱼小鯵｜轻盈鲜味 · 细腻银皮（刺身级） Koaji | Light, Fresh & Delicate Silver Fish (Sashimi Grade)
category: ③ 银皮鱼  Silver Skin Fish 风味逐渐提升，带有微妙的酸香与层次变化，让整体节奏开始变得更有性格
unit: Approx. 0.8lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
小竹荚鱼（小鯵 / Koaji）属于日式寿司中的经典“光物（Hikari-mono 银皮鱼）”。小鯵体型小巧，肉质更细嫩、香气更清爽，非常适合做成醋渍（しめ / Shime）**处理。
醋渍能让鱼肉口感更紧致爽口，同时突出小鯵本身的鲜甜与海味香气，入口带淡淡醋香、脂香与回甘，是Omakase中非常受欢迎的精致小品，一口就能感受到日式光物的魅力。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，小鯵（Shime Koaji）通常属于：
 ✅ 第③步：光物银皮鱼（Hikari-mono）转折段（轻盈版）
 一般安排在白身鱼之后、较浓郁的Saba/Iwashi之前，用清爽醋香做节奏切换，为后续浓郁风味铺垫。
口感风味
淡淡醋香，清爽开胃
肉质紧致爽口，越嚼越香
油脂轻盈，余韵干净回甘
推荐吃法
醋渍寿司（推荐）｜葱姜搭配｜轻炙烧（可选）

✅ 3种最经典日式吃法
① 南蛮渍（居酒屋爆款✅）
小鯵裹粉炸至金黄 → 泡进日式醋汁
 加洋葱丝/胡萝卜丝
酸香开胃、冷吃更爽，一吃停不下来。
② 小鯵唐扬 / 天妇罗（最香）🔥
裹唐扬粉/天妇罗浆 → 炸至外酥
 配：柠檬角 + 七味粉/椒盐
外酥里嫩，超下酒。
③ 盐烤小鯵（定食风）
撒盐 → 煎/烤至表面微焦
 配萝卜泥 + 酢橘/柠檬
清爽耐吃，最日式。
4) ✅ Omakase摆盘步骤（小鉢/前菜位）
【Omakase Koaji 出餐流程】
处理干净（去鳞去内脏）
料理选择：
Nanbanzuke 南蛮渍（最推荐做小鉢）
或 唐扬炸物（Agemono位）
南蛮渍摆盘：小钵盛装，鱼身上铺洋葱丝胡萝卜丝
点睛：细葱/芝麻/酢橘皮屑少许
上桌定位：Omakase 小鉢 / 前菜开胃位
Chef小贴士：小鯵清爽，最适合“醋汁与柑橘”，能把鲜味拉到很干净。

Koaji (Small Horse Mackerel) is a classic hikari-mono (silver-skinned fish) in Japanese sushi. With its smaller size, koaji offers a lighter, cleaner aroma and a delicate texture—making it perfect for the traditional shime (vinegar-cured) preparation.
Shime Koaji delivers a refreshing bite: gently bright acidity, tightened texture, refined sweetness, and clean umami. A beloved omakase delicacy that brings elegance and balance to the course progression.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, shime koaji is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ③ – Hikari-mono Transition (Lighter Style)
 Often placed after white fish and before stronger silver-skinned fish like saba/iwashi, offering a refreshing palate shift.
Taste Profile
Bright, refreshing vinegar finish
Tighter, crisp texture
Clean umami with a light sweet aftertaste
Best For
Shime-style sushi (Recommended) | Ginger pairing | Optional light sear

name: 小肌｜职人轻腌 · 酸香平衡（刺身级） Kohada | Artisan-Cured, Bright & Balanced (Sashimi Grade)
category: ③ 银皮鱼  Silver Skin Fish 风味逐渐提升，带有微妙的酸香与层次变化，让整体节奏开始变得更有性格
unit: Approx. 1.1lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
小肌（コハダ / Kohada）是江户前寿司中最具代表性的经典光物之一，被称为“寿司匠心的试金石”。其风味特点是香气鲜明、层次复杂、存在感强，通常以**醋渍（しめ / Shime）**方式处理，展现出恰到好处的酸度、鱼脂甜香与紧致口感。
小肌不是靠“浓油脂”取胜，而是靠处理手法、酸度平衡、回甘与香气打动人。好的小肌入口清爽、越嚼越香，余韵带淡淡海味回甘，是懂吃客在Omakase中最期待的一贯之一。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，小肌通常属于：
 ✅ 第③步：光物银皮鱼（Hikari-mono）核心段
 一般安排在白身鱼之后，用经典醋渍光物作为“江户前转折点”，为后续更浓郁的鱼种/金枪鱼系列铺垫。
口感风味
醋香清爽，层次丰富
口感紧致，香气鲜明
回甘明显，越嚼越香
产品亮点
✅ 江户前寿司灵魂光物：经典必吃
✅ 醋渍（Shime）核心技法：酸度平衡最关键
✅ 风味辨识度高：存在感强、记忆点足
✅ Omakase光物核心位：节奏转折的灵魂一贯
✅ 老饕必点：懂吃客最爱的光物之一
推荐吃法
醋渍寿司（推荐）｜寿司｜搭配少量姜/葱｜清酒绝配
Omakase必做吃法（小肌的正确打开方式）
① 酢締め（Shime Kohada）✅
盐腌 → 醋腌 → 切片
这是小肌的灵魂工艺，做完立刻“寿司店级”。
② 握寿司（Nigiri）
酢締め小肌铺在寿司饭上
 刷一点醋收口，撒少许白芝麻
经典江户前：酸、鲜、脂，层次感爆表。
③ 小肌小钵（前菜小品）
酢締め后切段
 配黄瓜片/姜丝/海带芽，酸香开胃解腻。
4) ✅ Omakase出餐步骤（专业SOP）
【Omakase Kohada 出餐流程】
保鲜：0–4°C低温冷藏
处理：开腹去内脏，轻洗擦干
盐腌：覆盖细盐 10–20 分钟（视鱼体大小）
冲盐：快速冲洗后擦干
醋腌：米醋浸 10–20 分钟（控制酸度与口感）
切片：斜刀切片，保持鱼皮完整
握寿司：轻压寿司饭，鱼片覆面
点睛：白芝麻/姜末少许
定位：Omakase 青鱼寿司位（Edomae）
Chef小贴士：小肌的高级感来自“时间控制”。盐/醋的分钟数就是风味开关。

Kohada (Dotted Gizzard Shad) is one of the most iconic fish in Edomae sushi, often considered a true test of a sushi chef’s technique. Traditionally prepared in shime style (vinegar-cured), kohada showcases a refined balance of acidity, clean sweetness, and layered umami with a tight, crisp texture.
Rather than relying on heavy fat, kohada shines through precision curing and balance. A great kohada tastes refreshing, aromatic, and increasingly flavorful as you chew—an essential and highly anticipated piece in any serious omakase.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, kohada is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ③ – Core Hikari-mono (Silver-Skinned Fish) Course
 Often placed after white fish as an Edomae-style turning point before moving into richer flavors and tuna courses.
Taste Profile
Bright, refined shime acidity
Tight, crisp texture
Layered umami with a clean sweet finish
Key Highlights
✅ Signature Edomae sushi classic
✅ Best served shime-style (vinegar-cured)
✅ Aromatic and highly distinctive flavor
✅ Core transition piece in omakase progression
✅ Loved by serious sushi enthusiasts
Best For
Shime-style sushi (Recommended) | Sushi | Ginger pairing | Perfect with sake

name: 青里乌贼 刺身级 ｜ Aori Ika | Premium Sweet Squid (Sashimi Grade)
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次
unit: Approx. 3lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
活〆アオリイカ（Aori Ika）是寿司店最受欢迎的高端乌贼之一。
 本品为神奈川产活〆（Ikejime）处理，锁住鲜度与口感，肉质清甜干净、入口Q糯弹韧，并拥有极漂亮的“透明感”。
 适合做 刺身、握寿司、轻炙乌贼，是Omakase里非常高级的“软体位主角”。🦑✨
产品亮点
活〆处理：最大程度保留鲜度、减少腥味
口感高级：清甜、Q糯、柔韧不韧口
透明感强：刺身摆盘非常出片
多用途：刺身/寿司/轻炙/乌贼细丝
✅ Omakase推荐吃法
① 刺身（Sashimi）✅
薄切或细丝切（更显透明感）
 配：姜泥 + 少量酱油
酱油一定要少，重点是乌贼的清甜。
② 握寿司（Nigiri）
寿司店必做：表面划细刀纹（更软更甜）
 轻刷酱油（Nikkiri），点一点山葵
③ 轻炙（Aburi）
喷枪 3–5 秒快速炙香
 外香内糯，乌贼香气直接升级。
✅ 活新鲜保存/处理要点（非常重要！）
0–4°C冷藏保鲜（不要反复温差）
尽快食用：鲜度是灵魂
切片前回温2–3分钟：甜味更明显
避免重口调味：不要泡酱油，不要重盐
用厨房纸轻吸表面水分：口感更清爽、更像寿司店
口诀：冷藏稳温、轻调味、吃鲜甜。

Fresh Ikejime Kanagawa Aori Ika (Bigfin Reef Squid) is a premium squid widely served in high-end sushi restaurants.
 Processed with the ikejime (live-killed) method to preserve freshness and texture. Clean sweetness, delicate bite, and a beautiful translucent appearance. Perfect for sashimi, nigiri, or lightly torched aburi squid.
Key Features
Origin: Kanagawa, Japan
Processing: Ikejime (live-killed)
Taste/Texture: clean sweetness, tender yet bouncy bite
Best for: sashimi, nigiri sushi, aburi
Chef Tip
Score fine knife cuts for nigiri to enhance tenderness. Serve with ginger and minimal soy sauce, or with sea salt + citrus for a refined finish.

name: 优美臻选｜鲜活黑鲍（现开刺身级）｜高端Omakase食材｜Uminoya Premium Live Awabi
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次
unit: Approx. 1lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
黑鲍（黒アワビ / Awabi）是日本料理中最具代表性的顶级珍味之一，被视为“贝类天花板”。其特点是口感脆弹紧实、鲜味浓郁、旨味深长，越嚼越甜，余韵带海洋矿物香气，非常有层次。
在寿司店与Omakase中，黑鲍既可做刺身展现其爽脆质地，也常以蒸煮/柔煮方式让肉质更软糯、鲜甜更集中，搭配鲍肝酱（肝ソース）则是奢华级别的经典吃法。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，黑鲍通常属于：
 ✅ 第④–⑤步：贝类段高级主角（Premium Shellfish Highlight）
 一般出现在贝类段的高光位置，有时也作为热菜/熟物珍味登场，为后续金枪鱼与海胆压轴铺垫。
口感风味
脆弹紧实，越嚼越甜
旨味深长，海味干净高级
余韵带矿物香与回甘
产品亮点
✅ 日本顶级贝类珍味：寿司店/Omakase高端代表
✅ 刺身与熟制都优秀：多种出品方式都高级
✅ 口感辨识度极强：脆弹鲜甜，一口记住
✅ 鲍肝酱搭配经典：奢华加分项
推荐吃法
刺身｜寿司｜清蒸/柔煮｜黄油煎｜鲍肝酱（Kimo sauce）

鲍鱼肝处理方法（Awabi Kimo）
A) 取肝与基础清洁（最关键的第一步）
取出内脏团：从鲍肉后端（贴壳处）连着的一团就是内脏
分离肝脏：内脏里偏深色、质地细腻的那块是“肝/肝胰腺”
去砂与杂质：
用厨房纸轻轻擦拭表面
用冰盐水快速冲洗 3–5 秒（不要久泡）
去黑膜/筋膜（可选但推荐）：把表面的薄膜轻轻撕掉，口感更细
⚠️关键：不要长时间用水冲/泡，会把香味洗掉，反而腥。
B) 去腥去苦的“日料店做法”（必学）
鲍肝的“苦”主要来自胆汁与杂味，处理核心是：去胆 + 轻盐处理 + 低温熟化。
Step 1：去胆（苦味源头）
肝旁边常有一小段 胆囊/胆管（偏绿/黑，像小胶囊）
用刀尖轻挑去掉
一旦破了会“苦爆”，宁可多切掉一点肝边缘也要干净
Step 2：盐+酒快速腌（去腥）
肝表面撒少量盐
淋一点清酒（或料酒）
静置 5–8 分钟
厨房纸吸干
C) 熟制方式（两种：蒸/低温煮）
做肝酱时建议“蒸”，香气更集中；怕苦更重的建议“低温煮”。
方案1：蒸（推荐✅香最浓）
肝放小碟，盖保鲜膜扎两三个小孔
中火蒸 3–5 分钟（肝变深色、中心略凝固即可）
取出放凉
✅优点：香味集中、做肝酱最好
 ⚠️注意：蒸过头会粉、苦更明显
方案2：低温煮（更稳✅苦味更温和）
60–65°C 10–15 分钟（或小火保持“微微冒泡的边缘水温”）
捞出吸干放凉
✅优点：更嫩、更少苦
 ⚠️注意：温度太高会柴并放大苦味
✅ D) 经典“鲍肝酱”做法（Omakase同款 Kimo Sauce）
配方（最百搭版本）
熟鲍肝：1份
清酒：1–2汤匙
味醂：1汤匙
日式酱油：1–2茶匙
黄油：5–10g（关键：让肝酱变丝滑）
可选：一点点糖 / 柚子汁几滴（收口更干净）
做法
鲍肝 + 清酒 + 味醂 小火加热 1分钟去酒精
放入料理机/研钵打成细泥
小火回锅，加入黄油搅匀
用酱油“轻调味”，不要压住肝香
过筛（更细腻更像日料店）
✅ 成品口感：绵密丝滑、咸香回甘、轻微苦香高级
 ✅ 适配：柔煮鲍鱼 / 清蒸鲍鱼 / 烤鲍鱼 / 鲍鱼饭
✅ E) Omakase出餐搭配
1) 鲍鱼柔煮 + 肝酱（主菜位）
鲍鱼切厚片叠摆
肝酱淋“细线”
点缀木芽/细葱
配一点酢橘皮屑
这盘就是“日料店招牌”。
2) 鲍肝小钵珍味（Chinmi）
肝轻切小块
拌少量柚子醋/酱油
加海苔碎
下酒神品。
✅ F) 保存方法（商用/家庭都适用）
熟鲍肝：冷藏 0–4°C 1–2天内用完
肝酱（含黄油）：冷藏 2–3天
冷冻：肝酱可冷冻 2–3周（用前冷藏慢解冻）
小技巧：冷冻建议分装小份（一次一份），避免反复解冻影响口感。
✅ 关键避雷（鲍肝最容易翻车的3点）
胆不去干净 = 苦到无法卖
冲洗/泡太久 = 香味没了还腥
蒸过头 = 粉+苦感放大

Japan Black Abalone (Awabi / Kuro Awabi) is one of the most luxurious shellfish delicacies in Japanese cuisine—often considered the “king of shellfish.” It is prized for its crisp, firm bite, deep umami, and clean mineral ocean finish that becomes sweeter as you chew.
In sushi and omakase, awabi can be served as sashimi to highlight its signature texture, or steamed/simmered for a softer, sweeter, more concentrated flavor. A classic premium pairing is kimo sauce (abalone liver sauce) for maximum richness and depth.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, black abalone is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ④–⑤ – Premium Shellfish Highlight
 Often featured as a high-point shellfish course or seasonal cooked delicacy before tuna and uni finale.
Taste Profile
Crisp, firm, satisfying texture
Deep umami with clean ocean sweetness
Mineral finish with long lingering sweetness
Key Highlights
✅ Luxury Japanese shellfish delicacy
✅ Excellent for sashimi, sushi, or steamed preparation
✅ Signature crisp bite and deep umami
✅ Perfect with kimo sauce (abalone liver sauce)
Best For
Sashimi | Sushi | Steamed / simmered | Butter sear | Kimo sauce pairing

name: 鹅颈藤壶｜海味浓郁 · 稀有珍味 Kamenote | Gooseneck Barnacle (Ocean Umami)
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次
description:
鬼爪螺（カメノテ / Kamenote），又称“鹅颈藤壺”，是日本沿海非常稀有的天然海边珍味。外形像“鬼爪”，但味道却非常惊艳：海味极浓、鲜味爆棚，口感介于蛤蜊与蟹肉之间，带明显的矿物海盐香与回甘，是居酒屋与高端Omakase里才会出现的“懂吃款”。
最经典的做法是清煮/酒蒸，用最简单的盐度与温度释放它的鲜甜；也可做味噌汤或柚子醋蘸食，越吃越上头。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，鬼爪螺通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑤步：熟物/热菜段（Hot Dish / Seasonal Special）
 常作为季节限定的热菜小品或汤品出现，用强烈海味和香气提升节奏与满足感。
口感风味
海味浓郁，鲜味像海浪拍脸（但很高级）
肉质Q弹，类似蟹肉+贝类的结合
回甘明显，越嚼越香
产品亮点
✅ 德岛产地：日本沿海珍味代表
✅ 稀有天然海边食材：供应少、辨识度高
✅ Omakase加分项：懂吃客必点的季节珍味
✅ 做法简单但高级：清煮/酒蒸就非常惊艳
推荐吃法
清煮（推荐）｜酒蒸｜味噌汤｜柚子醋蘸食｜居酒屋下酒菜
最经典吃法
① 清煮蘸酱（最推荐✅）
水滚后下锅 3–5分钟
 捞起蘸：柚子醋/酱油+柠檬
鲜甜会非常集中，最能体现价值。
② 味噌汤（海味炸裂）
焯水后入味噌汤
 加豆腐、海带芽
汤头直接变“海鲜高汤”。
③ 海鲜火锅/清汤锅
作为海鲜配料入锅
越煮越鲜，适合宴客。
4) ✅ Omakase出餐步骤（珍味酒肴位）
【Omakase Kamenote 出餐流程】
清洗：用刷子刷净外壳缝隙砂泥
焯煮：
沸水加少许盐/清酒
下锅 3–5分钟
摆盘：
小钵或贝类盘
旁放柠檬角/酢橘
蘸汁：柚子醋（最佳）或酱油少许
上桌定位：Chinmi（珍味）/ Sakizuke（前菜酒肴）
Chef小贴士：カメノテ吃的是“本味”，调味越轻越高级。

Kamenote (Gooseneck Barnacles) is a rare Japanese coastal delicacy, prized for its intense ocean sweetness and deep umami. Despite its wild “claw-like” appearance, the flavor is incredibly refined—often described as a cross between crab and clams, with a clean mineral sea finish.
Best enjoyed simply boiled or steamed with sake, allowing the natural sweetness to shine. It’s a true “insider’s choice” found in izakayas and premium seasonal omakase menus.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, kamenote is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑤ – Hot Dish / Seasonal Special
 Often featured as a warm seasonal item (steamed/boiled or in soup) to elevate aroma and satisfaction.
Taste Profile
Ultra ocean-forward umami
Springy texture like crab + shellfish
Clean mineral finish with lingering sweetness
Key Highlights
✅ Rare Japanese coastal delicacy from Tokushima
✅ Intense umami, sweet ocean flavor
✅ Perfect for steaming/boiling or miso soup
✅ A premium seasonal omakase add-on
Best For
Boiled (Recommended) | Sake-steamed | Miso soup | Yuzu-ponzu dipping | Izakaya style

name: 黑花螺｜弹脆鲜甜 · 口感突出（刺身级） Kurobaigai | Firm, Crunchy & Naturally Sweet (Sashimi Grade)
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次
description:
北海道黑花螺（黒ばい貝 / Kurobaigai）是日本寿司店与Omakase中非常受欢迎的高级贝类之一，以其爽脆弹牙的口感、干净清甜的海味而著称。相比带子或蛤蜊的柔嫩，黑花螺属于“脆口系贝类”，吃起来更有嚼感、更耐吃，口感辨识度非常高。
黑花螺可做刺身、寿司，也非常适合酒蒸或轻煮，简单调味就能突出海味甜香，是贝类段里很加分的一道。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，黑花螺通常属于：
 ✅ 第④步：贝类段（Shellfish Course）
 作为“脆口担当”带来口感变化，丰富整套菜单的层次。
口感风味
爽脆弹牙，嚼感十足
海味干净清甜，余韵清爽
越嚼越香，层次感强
产品亮点
✅ 北海道产区：海味纯净，品质稳定
✅ 脆口贝类代表：口感高级、辨识度强
✅ 刺身寿司皆宜：出品精致耐吃
✅ 熟食也优秀：酒蒸/轻煮非常香
推荐吃法
刺身｜寿司｜酒蒸｜轻煮｜黄油蒜香（熟食）
3种最经典吃法
① 刺身/贝类拼盘（最推荐✅）
切片或斜切
 配：山葵 + 少量酱油
脆弹口感最突出，越嚼越甜。
② 日式酱油渍（居酒屋风）
螺肉切片
 拌：酱油 + 味醂 + 清酒
 加一点姜末/柚子皮
做成冷盘珍味非常好卖。
③ 清煮/味噌汤（鲜味更浓）
轻煮 3–5 分钟
 或入味噌汤搭配豆腐海带芽
汤头海味直接起飞。
4) ✅ Omakase摆盘步骤
【Omakase Kurobaigai 出餐流程】
保鲜：0–4°C冷藏保持冰感
清洁：淡盐水快速冲洗，吸干水分（不久泡）
切法：斜切薄片 0.5–0.7cm（更脆、更好嚼）
摆盘底：紫苏叶 + 白萝卜丝
主角：螺肉片扇形摆放，突出质感
配件：山葵/柚子胡椒 + 酱油轻点
定位：Omakase贝类位 / 珍味位
Chef小贴士：黒ばい貝本身味道干净，不需要复杂酱料，少即是贵。


Hokkaido Kurobaigai (Black Whelk) is a premium shellfish loved in sushi bars and omakase dining for its crisp, chewy bite and clean ocean sweetness. Unlike soft, creamy shellfish, kurobaigai is all about texture—refreshingly crunchy, satisfying, and increasingly aromatic as you chew.
Perfect for sashimi and sushi, and also excellent simply boiled or sake-steamed for a warm, umami-rich dish.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, kurobaigai is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ④ – Shellfish Course
 A texture-forward shellfish highlight that adds contrast and depth to the menu.
Taste Profile
Crisp, chewy, satisfying texture
Clean ocean sweetness
Aromatic finish that builds as you chew
Key Highlights
✅ Premium Hokkaido shellfish
✅ Signature crunchy bite & clean sweetness
✅ Ideal for sashimi, sushi, or warm dishes
✅ A texture highlight in omakase courses
Best For
Sashimi | Sushi | Sake-steamed | Boiled | Butter-garlic (cooked)

name: （小）粒贝｜厚实弹脆 · 风味浓郁（刺身级） Ezobora | Firm, Crunchy & Rich Flavor (Sashimi Grade)
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次
description:
北海道真ツブ贝（粒贝 / エゾボラ Ezobora）是日本寿司店与Omakase中非常经典的脆口贝类，以其爽脆弹牙的质地、干净清甜的海味而深受老饕喜爱。此款为北海道活贝，鲜度高，嚼感更佳，越嚼越香，非常耐吃。
真ツブ贝常用于刺身或寿司，切片后口感清脆有弹性，能明显丰富贝类段的口感层次；也适合轻煮或酒蒸，香气更立体。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，真ツブ贝通常属于：
 ✅ 第④步：贝类段（Shellfish Course）脆口担当
 一般安排在较柔软的带子、鸟贝之后，用“脆弹嚼感”做节奏变化，为后续金枪鱼/熟物铺垫。
口感风味
爽脆弹牙，嚼感十足
海味干净清甜，余韵清爽
越嚼越香，层次感强
产品亮点
✅ 北海道活贝：鲜度更高、口感更脆
✅ 脆口贝类代表：寿司店常用、辨识度强
✅ 刺身寿司皆宜：切片漂亮、出品高级
✅ 熟食也优秀：酒蒸/轻煮非常香
推荐吃法
刺身｜寿司｜酒蒸｜轻煮｜黄油蒜香（熟食）

3种最经典吃法
① 清煮（最推荐✅最能提现本味）
沸水加少许盐/清酒
 下锅 5–8分钟（视大小）
 捞起切片蘸：柚子醋/酱油+山葵
北海道贝类的鲜甜会直接爆开。
② 刺身/握寿司（寿司店同款）
熟后冰镇切薄片（口感更脆）
 配：山葵 + 少量酱油
重点是脆弹，不要重酱油。
③ 酱油渍冷盘（居酒屋珍味）
切片拌：酱油 + 味醂 + 清酒
 加姜末/柚子皮
冷盘珍味，下酒一绝。
4) ✅ Omakase出餐步骤
【Omakase Ezobora（真ツブ）出餐流程】
清洗：刷净外壳砂泥
清煮：沸水+少许盐/清酒，煮 5–8 分钟
取肉：挑出贝肉，去掉不可食部位
冰镇：冰水快速冷却（口感更脆弹）
切片：斜切薄片 0.5–0.7cm
摆盘：紫苏叶+白萝卜丝打底，贝肉扇形铺开
配件：山葵/柚子胡椒 + 酱油轻点
定位：Omakase贝类位 / 珍味位
Chef小贴士：煮完“冰镇”这一步非常关键，脆感会明显提升。

Hokkaido Live Sea Conch (Whelk) – Ezobora is a classic premium shellfish used in sushi bars and omakase dining. Loved for its crisp, chewy bite and clean ocean sweetness, ezobora becomes more aromatic as you chew—highly satisfying and addictive.
Served sliced for sashimi or sushi, it adds a refreshing crunchy texture contrast. It’s also excellent lightly boiled or sake-steamed for a warm umami-rich dish.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, ezobora whelk is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ④ – Shellfish Course (Crunchy Texture Highlight)
 Often placed to add texture contrast after softer shellfish like scallop, before moving into richer courses.
Taste Profile
Crisp, chewy, satisfying texture
Clean sweetness with refined umami
Aromatic finish that builds as you chew
Key Highlights
✅ Premium live shellfish from Hokkaido
✅ Signature crunchy bite and clean sweetness
✅ Perfect for sushi, sashimi, or warm dishes
✅ Omakase favorite texture highlight
Best For
Sashimi | Sushi | Light boil | Sake-steamed | Butter garlic (cooked)

name: （中）粒贝｜厚实弹脆 · 风味浓郁（刺身级） Ezobora | Firm, Crunchy & Rich Flavor (Sashimi Grade)
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次

name: （大）粒贝｜厚实弹脆 · 风味浓郁（刺身级） Ezobora | Firm, Crunchy & Rich Flavor (Sashimi Grade)
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次

name: 磯つぶ｜清爽弹脆 · 北海道小海螺（刺身级） Isotsubu | Light & Crunchy Hokkaido Whelk (Sashimi Grade)
category: ④ 贝类・软体  Shellfish & Mollusks 口感成为主角。弹、脆、滑之间的变化，为这一席Omakase增添丰富层次
description:
北海道虾夷贝（磯つぶ / Isotsubu・蝦夷ばい / Ezobai）是日本寿司店与Omakase里非常受欢迎的高级螺贝类食材，以其爽脆弹牙的嚼感、干净清甜的海味而闻名。它属于“脆口系贝类代表”，相比带子或鸟贝的柔嫩，虾夷贝更有嚼劲、更耐吃，越嚼越香，口感辨识度极高。
常见做法包括刺身/寿司切片出品，或酒蒸、轻煮带出香气与鲜甜，是贝类段里非常加分的一道“口感担当”。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，虾夷贝通常属于：
 ✅ 第④步：贝类段（Shellfish Course）脆口担当
 一般安排在较柔软贝类之后，用爽脆嚼感丰富层次，为后续金枪鱼/熟物段做铺垫。
口感风味
爽脆弹牙，越嚼越香
海味干净清甜，余韵清爽
香气细致，层次感强
产品亮点
✅ 北海道产区：海味纯净，品质稳定
✅ 螺贝脆口代表：寿司店常用、辨识度强
✅ 刺身寿司皆宜：出品精致、耐吃
✅ 熟食也优秀：酒蒸/轻煮香气更立体
推荐吃法
刺身｜寿司｜酒蒸｜轻煮｜黄油蒜香（熟食）

Fresh Hokkaido Sea Whelk (Isotsubu / Ezobai) is a premium Japanese shellfish loved in sushi bars and omakase dining for its crisp, chewy bite and clean ocean sweetness. Unlike soft, creamy shellfish, this whelk is texture-forward—refreshingly crunchy, satisfying, and increasingly aromatic as you chew.
Perfect sliced for sashimi or sushi, it’s also excellent lightly boiled or sake-steamed for a warm, umami-rich dish.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, sea whelk is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ④ – Shellfish Course (Crunchy Texture Highlight)
 Often placed after softer shellfish to add texture contrast before moving into richer courses.
Taste Profile
Crisp, chewy, satisfying texture
Clean sweetness with refined umami
Aromatic finish that builds as you chew
Key Highlights
✅ Premium shellfish from Hokkaido
✅ Signature crunchy bite and clean sweetness
✅ Great for sushi, sashimi, or warm dishes
✅ Omakase favorite texture highlight
Best For
Sashimi | Sushi | Light boil | Sake-steamed | Butter garlic (cooked)

name: 🇯🇵 青森 栗蟹（くりがに）Kurigani ｜Omakase季节限定食材｜Aomori Horsehair Crab (Kurigani)
category: 螃蟹｜Seasonal Live/Raw Crabs｜季节生鲜蟹运输过程中可能受温度与物流影响，保证新鲜，不保证活体到货，敬请理解
description:
**青森栗蟹（くりがに）**是日本东北地区人气极高的当季蟹种，以其细腻甜润的蟹肉与浓郁鲜香的蟹膏而闻名。栗蟹体型精巧，外壳细密绒毛带来独特口感与辨识度，尤其适合日料“少而精”的高级料理呈现。
来自日本青森海域的栗蟹，肉质紧实细嫩、甜味清爽，蟹膏醇厚浓郁，鲜味层次丰富。无论是清蒸、盐煮、炭烤，或做成蟹肉手卷、蟹膏拌饭，都能呈现非常高级的海鲜风味，是寿司店与Omakase常用的季节限定食材。
产品亮点
✅ 日本青森产地直采，季节限定
✅ 蟹肉细嫩紧实，清甜回甘
✅ 蟹膏浓郁醇厚，鲜味层次丰富
✅ 适合Omakase/寿司店/宴客
推荐吃法
盐煮/清蒸（推荐）｜炭烤｜蟹肉手卷｜蟹膏拌饭｜味噌汤

Aomori Horsehair Crab (Kurigani) is a seasonal Japanese delicacy loved for its naturally sweet, delicate crab meat and rich, creamy crab miso (roe paste). Smaller in size yet packed with flavor, Kurigani is prized in Japanese cuisine for its refined texture and premium presentation.
Sourced from the pristine waters of Aomori, Japan, this crab offers firm, tender meat with a clean sweetness, paired with deeply umami-rich crab miso for a luxurious finish. Enjoy it simply boiled or steamed, or elevate it into hand rolls, crab rice, or miso soup. A favorite ingredient for sushi bars and omakase dining.
Key Highlights
✅ Seasonal specialty from Aomori, Japan
✅ Sweet, delicate, firm crab meat
✅ Rich crab miso with deep umami
✅ Ideal for omakase, sushi bars & premium dining
Best For
Boiled/Steamed (Recommended) | Charcoal-Grilled | Crab Hand Roll | Crab Miso Rice | Miso Soup

description:

日本红毛蟹（毛ガニ）是日本三大名蟹之一，以“蟹肉甜、蟹膏香”闻名。相比松叶蟹的清雅与帝王蟹的霸气，红毛蟹以更细腻的肉质与浓郁蟹膏取胜，堪称“蟹膏党天花板”。
精选日本优质产区红毛蟹，蟹肉细嫩紧实、清甜回甘；蟹膏（蟹味噌）醇厚浓郁、鲜味深沉，简单盐煮/清蒸就能达到极高完成度。无论用于Omakase、寿司店出品，还是家庭宴客，都是极具高级感的季节海味。
口感风味
蟹肉：细嫩紧实、甜味突出
蟹膏：浓郁醇厚、鲜味深、回甘长
整体：海味纯净、层次丰富
产品亮点
✅ 日本名蟹代表：蟹肉甜、蟹膏浓郁
✅ 蟹膏党必吃：香浓细腻，鲜味层次丰富
✅ 简单料理就很好吃：盐煮/清蒸最能体现原味
✅ Omakase常用蟹：适合高级料理呈现
✅ 季节限定供应：当季新鲜风味最佳
推荐吃法
盐煮/清蒸（推荐）｜拆蟹肉蘸蟹膏｜蟹膏拌饭｜味噌汤｜蟹肉手卷
保存与食用建议
冷藏保存 0–4°C，建议尽快食用以保持最佳风味。
 加热建议：清蒸/盐煮 12–18 分钟（按大小调整），熟后静置 2–3 分钟风味更集中。

Overview
Japanese Hairy Crab (Kegani) is one of Japan’s most prized crabs, celebrated for its naturally sweet, delicate meat and exceptionally rich crab miso (tomalley). Compared to other premium crabs, Kegani stands out for its refined texture and deep umami-rich miso, making it a true favorite among crab lovers.
Carefully selected from premium Japanese waters, this crab delivers tender, firm meat with a clean sweetness, paired with creamy, intensely savory crab miso. Simply boiled or steamed is enough to showcase its peak flavor. Perfect for omakase dining, sushi bars, and elevated home feasts.
Taste Profile
Meat: sweet, delicate, firm
Miso: rich, creamy, deep umami
Overall: clean ocean flavor, layered finish
Key Highlights
✅ One of Japan’s most iconic premium crabs
✅ Famous for rich crab miso and sweet meat
✅ Best enjoyed simply boiled or steamed
✅ Ideal for sushi bars & omakase dining
✅ Seasonal delicacy with limited supply
Best For
Boiled/Steamed (Recommended) | Crab meat with miso | Crab miso rice | Miso soup | Crab hand roll

description:
产品概述
北海道松葉ズワイ蟹（松叶雪蟹）是日本冬季最具代表性的高级蟹种之一，以蟹腿肉细嫩清甜与鲜味层次丰富著称。相比口感更厚重的红毛蟹，松叶雪蟹风味更清雅、甜味更突出，入口干净回甘，是寿司店与Omakase料理中常见的季节限定主角。
精选北海道优质产区松叶雪蟹，蟹肉纤维细致、肉质饱满，简单清蒸或盐煮即可呈现极高完成度，也适合做蟹肉刺身/蟹肉寿司、蟹肉丼饭等日式高级料理。
口感风味
蟹腿肉：清甜细嫩、纤维细致、回甘明显
蟹香：海味纯净、鲜味层次丰富
整体：清雅不腻，余韵悠长
产品亮点
✅ 北海道产区：冬季限定，海味纯净
✅ 蟹腿肉甜润饱满：纤维细、口感细嫩
✅ 鲜味层次丰富：清雅但味道非常“深”
✅ Omakase常用：冬季主角蟹，出品高级
✅ 简单料理就惊艳：清蒸/盐煮最能体现原味
推荐吃法
清蒸（推荐）｜盐煮｜蟹肉刺身风｜蟹肉寿司｜蟹肉丼｜蟹肉味噌汤
保存与食用建议
冷藏：0–4°C 保存，建议尽快食用风味最佳
加热建议：清蒸/盐煮 8–12 分钟（按大小调整），熟后静置 1–2 分钟更甜

Overview
Hokkaido Matsuba Snow Crab (Zuwai Crab) is one of Japan’s most iconic winter delicacies, prized for its naturally sweet, tender leg meat and layered umami. Compared to richer crab varieties, Matsuba snow crab delivers a cleaner, more elegant sweetness with a refined finish, making it a seasonal highlight in sushi bars and omakase dining.
Carefully selected from premium waters in Hokkaido, this crab features delicate, flaky meat with excellent fullness. Best enjoyed simply steamed or gently boiled, and also perfect for sushi, sashimi-style crab preparations, crab rice bowls, and miso soup.
Taste Profile
Leg meat: delicate, sweet, tender, clean finish
Aroma: pure ocean fragrance, rich umami layers
Overall: elegant sweetness with a long finish
Key Highlights
✅ Seasonal premium crab from Hokkaido
✅ Sweet, delicate leg meat with fine texture
✅ Clean flavor with layered umami
✅ Omakase favorite winter crab selection
✅ Best served simply: steamed/boiled for peak taste
Best For
Steamed (Recommended) | Lightly Boiled | Crab sushi | Sashimi-style crab | Crab don | Crab miso soup
Storage & Cooking
Refrigerate at 0–4°C and enjoy as soon as possible for peak quality
Cooking tip: Steam or boil for 8–12 minutes (adjust by size), then rest for 1–2 minutes for best sweetness

name: 沢蟹（さわがに） Sawagani / Japanese river crab (Sawagani)
category: 螃蟹｜Seasonal Live/Raw Crabs｜季节生鲜蟹运输过程中可能受温度与物流影响，保证新鲜，不保证活体到货，敬请理解
description:
产品概述
日本淡水小沢蟹（沢蟹 / Sawagani）是日本溪流与山泉水域中的淡水小蟹，体型小巧但风味集中，是日式料理中极具特色的季节食材。其优势在于蟹香浓郁、鲜味突出，非常适合做成Omakase中的精致前菜或下酒小品。
在日本料理中，沢蟹常用于唐扬（酥炸）、天妇罗、佃煮等做法。炸制后外壳薄脆、香气扑鼻，入口鲜甜带微微矿物感与清爽余韵，是许多资深日料客非常喜欢的“懂吃款”。
口感风味
蟹香浓郁，鲜味集中
外壳薄脆（油炸后）
甜味清爽，余韵干净
产品亮点
✅ 日本季节限定淡水蟹：稀缺小众、高辨识度
✅ 风味集中：蟹香浓、鲜味突出
✅ 日式经典吃法：唐扬/天妇罗/佃煮
✅ Omakase常见小品：适合前菜、下酒菜
推荐吃法
唐扬（推荐）｜天妇罗｜佃煮｜椒盐炸｜下酒小食

Overview
Japanese River Crab (Sawagani) is a small freshwater crab sourced from clean mountain streams in Japan. Despite its small size, it delivers a concentrated crab aroma and rich umami, making it a unique seasonal delicacy in Japanese cuisine and a popular item for omakase appetizers.
Sawagani is commonly prepared as karaage (crispy fried), tempura, or tsukudani. When fried, the shell becomes light and crunchy with an intensely savory crab fragrance and a clean, mildly sweet finish. A true “insider” delicacy loved by experienced Japanese food lovers.
Taste Profile
Intense crab aroma & umami
Light crispy crunch (when fried)
Clean sweetness with refreshing finish
Key Highlights
✅ Seasonal freshwater crab from Japan
✅ Concentrated flavor: rich aroma and deep umami
✅ Classic Japanese preparations: karaage/tempura/tsukudani
✅ Omakase favorite: perfect as an appetizer or bar snack
Best For
Karaage (Recommended) | Tempura | Tsukudani | Salt & Pepper Fry | Pair with Sake

name: 北海道鳕鱼白子（Shirako）｜季节限定珍味｜Omakase顶配｜海的奶油｜入口即化｜ Hokkaido Cod Shirako | Seasonal Delicacy | Omakase Premium
category: ⑤ 炙烧・熟成  Aburi & Aged Selection 火与时间带来更深的香气与旨味，味道开始变得更加浓郁而立体
description:
鳕鱼白子（白子 / Shirako）是日本冬季最具代表性的高级珍味之一，尤其以北海道产区品质著称。白子口感极其细腻绵密，入口如奶油般柔滑，带清甜海味与细致旨味，被许多日料老饕称为“海的奶油”。
在Omakase中，Shirako常作为冬季限定的高级加分项，既可以做成柚子醋（Ponzu）冷食突出清甜，也可以轻煎、炭烤或做汤品，香气更浓、口感更丰润，是极具奢华感与季节感的一道。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，北海道鳕鱼白子通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑤步：熟物/热菜段（Cooked Hot Course）
 常安排在中后段作为季节限定热菜或小锅，提升香气与满足感，为后续金枪鱼/海胆压轴铺垫。
口感风味
绵密细腻、奶油感强
清甜鲜美、回甘明显
加热后香气更浓郁
产品亮点
✅ 北海道产区：冬季白子代表产地
✅ 季节限定珍味：供应期短，懂吃必点
✅ Omakase顶配加分项：辨识度高、极具高级感
✅ 料理方式多样：Ponzu/煎/烤/汤都出彩
推荐吃法
柚子醋（推荐）｜轻煎｜炭烤｜白子汤｜白子茶碗蒸（可选）
4种最经典吃法
① 轻焯白子 + 柚子醋（最推荐✅）
白子轻焯 10–20 秒 → 冰水降温
 装盘淋 柚子醋 Ponzu
口感最像“奶油海味”，清爽又高级。
② 炭烤白子（Omakase常见）
表面撒盐
 烤至微焦、内里半熟流心
外香内糯，香到离谱。
③ 白子天妇罗（最受欢迎炸物）
裹薄粉/天妇罗浆
 炸至外酥
奶油馅一样的口感，特别满足。
④ 白子锅（Nabe）
加进昆布高汤
 搭配白菜、豆腐、葱
汤头会变得浓白鲜甜，超适合冬天。
 ✅ Omakase出餐步骤
【Omakase Shirako 出餐流程】
解冻/保鲜：保持低温冰鲜
清洁：轻轻冲洗表面血水，用厨房纸吸干（避免揉搓）
去腥关键：
淡盐水或清酒轻浸 1–2 分钟
再吸干
出餐方式（三选一）：
轻焯 10–20 秒（最推荐）
炭烤 盐烤到微焦
天妇罗 薄浆轻炸
摆盘：
轻焯白子：小钵 + 柚子醋 + 细葱
烤白子：陶板/石板摆盘 + 盐 + 酢橘
定位：Omakase 冬季珍味位 / 小品位
Chef小贴士：白子要“轻火”。过熟会缩、口感变粉，别让它哭😭（它一哭就不好吃了）。

🇺🇸 English Product Description (E-commerce Version | With Omakase Step)
Overview
Cod Shirako (Japanese fish milt) is one of Japan’s most prized winter delicacies, and Hokkaido shirako is especially celebrated for its premium quality. With an ultra-creamy, custard-like texture and delicate ocean sweetness, shirako is often described as “ocean cream.”
In omakase dining, shirako is a seasonal luxury highlight—served chilled with ponzu for a clean, sweet finish, or lightly seared/grilled/simmered for a richer aroma and deeper indulgence.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, cod shirako is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑤ – Cooked Hot Course / Seasonal Special
 Often placed mid-to-late meal as a seasonal warm dish to elevate aroma and richness before the finale.
Taste Profile
Ultra creamy, melt-in-your-mouth texture
Delicate sweetness with refined umami
Richer aroma when cooked
Key Highlights
✅ Premium winter delicacy from Hokkaido
✅ Seasonal limited item loved by sushi connoisseurs
✅ Luxury omakase add-on highlight
✅ Perfect for ponzu, seared, grilled, soup
Best For
Ponzu (Recommended) | Lightly seared | Grilled | Soup | Chawanmushi (optional)

description:
Kinki（キンキ / 喜知次 Kichiji）是北海道顶级鱼种之一，以其油脂丰厚、肉质细嫩、香气浓郁而闻名，被称为“白身鱼里的奢侈品”。此款为北海道根室产 Tag付き（带产地标签认证），代表更严格的产地与流通标准，品质更稳定，是寿司店与Omakase料理中极受欢迎的高级鱼。
Kinki最经典的吃法是盐烧、煮付或轻炙烧，油脂会在加热后释放出极具高级感的香气与甜味，口感细嫩入口即化，余韵悠长，非常适合作为Omakase后段的“浓郁主角”。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，Kinki通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑤–⑥步：浓郁主角段 / 熟物热菜段（Rich Feature Fish / Cooked Course）
 常安排在中后段，以丰富油脂与香气拉升整套菜单的高级感与满足度。
口感风味
油脂丰厚但细腻，入口细嫩
甜味突出，香气浓郁
回甘悠长，风味高级不腻
产品亮点
✅ 北海道根室产区：高品质海域代表
✅ Tag付き产地认证：来源可追溯，品质更稳定
✅ 高脂白身鱼天花板：油脂香气极强
✅ Omakase后段主角：熟食位最能体现价值
✅ 盐烧/煮付绝配：香气与甜味全面释放
推荐吃法
盐烧（推荐）｜煮付（Nitsuke）｜西京渍｜轻炙烧｜炖煮

Kinki (Kichiji) is one of Hokkaido’s most prized luxury fish, celebrated for its rich buttery fat, tender texture, and intensely aromatic sweetness—often considered a “premium indulgence” among white fish. This selection comes from Nemuro, Hokkaido and is tagged (traceable origin), indicating verified sourcing and high handling standards.
Kinki truly shines when cooked: salt-grilled or simmered (nitsuke), where the fat releases a deeply fragrant sweetness and silky texture with a long refined finish—perfect as a late-course highlight in omakase.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, kinki is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑤–⑥ – Rich Feature Fish / Cooked Hot Course
 Often placed in later courses to elevate richness and aroma, creating a luxurious highlight before the finale.
Taste Profile
Buttery rich fat with tender, flaky meat
Intensely aromatic sweetness
Long, refined finish without heaviness
Key Highlights
✅ Premium fish from Nemuro, Hokkaido
✅ Tagged / traceable origin for quality assurance
✅ One of the richest, most luxurious “white fish” in Japan
✅ Omakase favorite for late-course cooked highlight
✅ Best for grilling, simmering, saikyo-yaki
Best For
Salt-Grilled (Recommended) | Nitsuke (Simmered) | Saikyo-yaki | Aburi | Stewed

name: 喉黑（红瞳）｜高脂炙香 · 入口即化（刺身级） Nodoguro | Rich, Buttery & Aburi Aroma (Sashimi Grade)
category: ⑤ 炙烧・熟成  Aburi & Aged Selection 火与时间带来更深的香气与旨味，味道开始变得更加浓郁而立体
unit: Approx. lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
喉黑（のどぐろ / Nodoguro，釣りアカムツ）是日本料理界公认的顶级鱼种之一，被誉为“白身鱼里的大腹”。其最大特点是油脂丰厚却细腻不腻，甜味爆发、香气浓郁，入口几乎带奶油感，鲜味与回甘层次极强，是寿司店与Omakase中最能体现奢华感的明星鱼。
此款为钓获（釣り）喉黑，鱼体状态更佳，肉质更紧实，风味更干净。最经典吃法是**轻炙烧（Aburi）**或盐烧，油脂在热度下被瞬间激发，香气直接拉满，是懂吃客必点。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，喉黑通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑤–⑥步：浓郁主角段 / 炙烧熟物段（Rich Feature Fish / Aburi & Cooked Course）
 一般放在中后段作为油脂高潮位，带来强烈满足感，为后续金枪鱼或海胆压轴做铺垫。
口感风味
油脂丰厚但细腻，入口即化
甜味强、香气浓，旨味爆发
回甘悠长，余韵极强
产品亮点
✅ 顶级高脂白身鱼：奢华口感代表
✅ 钓获（釣り）品质更佳：肉质更紧实更干净
✅ 炙烧表现天花板：香气与甜脂全面释放
✅ Omakase后段主角：油脂高潮位担当
✅ 宴客极有面子：一口记住的高级感
推荐吃法
轻炙烧（推荐）｜盐烧｜刺身（熟练处理）｜煮付（Nitsuke）｜西京渍

Nodoguro (Akamutsu / Blackthroat Seaperch) is one of Japan’s most luxurious fish, often called the “otoro of white fish.” It’s prized for its ultra-rich yet refined buttery fat, intense natural sweetness, and deeply aromatic umami. The texture is silky and almost melt-in-your-mouth, delivering an unforgettable finish.
This selection is line-caught (tsuri) for superior condition and cleaner flavor. Best enjoyed aburi (lightly seared) or grilled, where the fat becomes intensely fragrant and sweet.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, nodoguro is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑤–⑥ – Rich Feature Fish / Aburi & Cooked Course
 Often placed later to create a richness peak and luxurious highlight before the finale.
Taste Profile
Ultra rich buttery fat with refined sweetness
Highly aromatic umami
Smooth melt with a long luxurious finish
Key Highlights
✅ One of Japan’s most premium rich fish
✅ Line-caught for premium condition and cleaner taste
✅ Perfect for aburi and grilling
✅ Omakase favorite late-course highlight
✅ Luxury-level sweetness and aroma
Best For
Aburi (Recommended) | Grilled | Nitsuke (Simmered) | Saikyo-yaki | Optional sashimi

name: 日本海鳗苗（穴子稚鱼）季节限定｜ Japanese Conger Eel Fry (Anago Fry) | Seasonal
category: ⑤ 炙烧・熟成  Aburi & Aged Selection 火与时间带来更深的香气与旨味，味道开始变得更加浓郁而立体
description:
日本海鳗苗（穴子稚鱼）是日本料理中常见的季节性食材，体型细小但鲜味集中，口感柔嫩细腻。常用于天妇罗、唐扬（炸物）、南蛮渍等日式做法，外酥里嫩、香气浓郁，非常适合做Omakase热菜小品或下酒小食。
海鳗苗风味清爽不腻，带淡淡海洋甜味，经过轻炸或快速加热后香气更突出，口感更有层次，是喜欢日式炸物与季节料理的客人必点食材。
产品亮点
✅ 日本季节限定食材，小众高级
✅ 肉质柔嫩、鲜味集中
✅ 适合天妇罗/唐扬/南蛮渍等料理
✅ Omakase热菜位常见小品
推荐吃法
天妇罗（推荐）｜唐扬｜椒盐炸｜南蛮渍｜配啤酒/清酒

Japanese Anago (Conger Eel) Fry is a unique seasonal delicacy commonly used in Japanese cuisine. Small in size yet packed with flavor, it offers a tender bite with clean umami and a subtle ocean sweetness. It is best enjoyed as an agemono (fried course), prepared as tempura, karaage (crispy fried), salt & pepper fry, or nanban-style marinade.
Compared to heavier, oilier items, anago fry is lighter and cleaner, making it a perfect omakase hot course or Japanese bar snack. Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside—highly addictive.
Key Highlights
✅ Seasonal Japanese delicacy
✅ Tender texture with concentrated umami
✅ Excellent for fried dishes (Agemono course)
✅ Popular as an omakase hot dish / bar snack
Best For
Tempura (Recommended) | Karaage | Salt & Pepper Fry | Nanban Style | Pair with Sake or Beer

name: 目光鱼 Mehikari｜日式炸鱼必吃｜唐扬/天妇罗推荐 ｜Mehikari | Japanese Deep-Fried Favorite | Karaage / Tempura
category: ⑤ 炙烧・熟成  Aburi & Aged Selection 火与时间带来更深的香气与旨味，味道开始变得更加浓郁而立体
description:
目光鱼（メヒカリ / Mehikari）是日本料理中非常有人气的“小鱼界明星”，以其肉质柔嫩、油脂香浓、炸出来外酥里嫩而闻名。虽然体型不大，但风味一点都不“低调”，油脂在高温下释放出诱人的香气，入口鲜甜多汁，越吃越香，是居酒屋与Omakase热菜位常见的经典小品。
Mehikari最推荐的做法是**日式唐扬（酥炸）**或天妇罗，搭配少量盐/柠檬即可把鲜味完全打开。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，目光鱼通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑤步：炸物/热菜段（Agemono / Hot Course）
 一般安排在中后段，让口感从生食切换到热菜，提升香气与满足感。
口感风味
外酥里嫩，多汁鲜甜
油脂香浓但不腻口
香气明显，余韵很满足
产品亮点
✅ 小鱼界明星：一吃就上瘾的香炸口感
✅ 油脂香浓：炸/烤后香气爆发
✅ Omakase热菜小品：居酒屋&寿司店经典
✅ 做法简单：盐+柠檬就是灵魂搭配
推荐吃法
唐扬酥炸（推荐）｜天妇罗｜盐烤｜配柠檬/椒盐

Mehikari (メヒカリ) is a beloved Japanese “small fish star,” famous for its tender juicy meat and rich aroma, especially when cooked. Though small in size, it delivers big flavor: lightly fried, it becomes crispy outside and succulent inside, releasing a fragrant buttery richness.
A classic favorite in izakayas and also served as an omakase hot dish, mehikari is best enjoyed as karaage (Japanese deep-fried) or tempura with a simple salt and lemon pairing.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, mehikari is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑤ – Agemono / Hot Course (Fried Dish)
 Often placed mid-to-late meal to transition from sashimi/sushi into warm, aromatic dishes.
Taste Profile
Crispy outside, juicy inside
Rich aroma with clean sweetness
Highly satisfying finish
Key Highlights
✅ Iconic Japanese fried fish favorite
✅ Rich aroma and tender texture
✅ Perfect for karaage or tempura
✅ Popular as an omakase hot course
Best For
Karaage (Recommended) | Tempura | Salt-grilled | Lemon pairing

name: 日本新鲜虎虾车海老（車海老 Kuruma Ebi）｜虾类天花板｜Omakase必点｜ Japan Fresh Kuruma Ebi (Tiger Prawn) | The King of Prawns | Omakase Must-Try
category: ⑤ 炙烧・熟成  Aburi & Aged Selection 火与时间带来更深的香气与旨味，味道开始变得更加浓郁而立体
description:
车海老（車海老 / Kuruma Ebi）是日本寿司店与Omakase中最具代表性的高级虾类之一，常被称为“虾类天花板”。其特点是甜味浓、肉质紧实弹牙、香气高级，无论做刺身或熟制寿司都非常出彩。
在传统江户前寿司中，车海老多以轻煮/汆烫后冰镇再上桌，能最大程度释放虾的甜香与鲜味，口感更紧实、更有层次。对于Omakase来说，车海老往往是一道“让客人瞬间满足”的经典主角。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，车海老通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑥步：熟虾/熟物段（Cooked Seafood Course）
 一般安排在中后段，作为熟制海鲜的代表，与后续海胆/手卷压轴衔接非常顺。
口感风味
甜味突出，鲜香浓郁
肉质紧实弹牙，口感高级
熟制后香气更立体，余韵更甜
产品亮点
✅ 日本顶级虾类代表：寿司店/Omakase经典
✅ 甜度高、弹性强：一口就能感受到高级感
✅ 熟制寿司表现最佳：传统江户前出品方式
✅ 适合宴客：辨识度高、非常有面子
推荐吃法
寿司（轻煮后最推荐）｜刺身（可选）｜甜虾风格呈现｜搭配少量盐/柚子

Kuruma Ebi (Tiger Prawn) is one of the most premium shrimp used in top sushi bars and omakase dining—often regarded as the “king of prawns.” It is prized for its intense natural sweetness, firm bouncy texture, and refined aroma.
In traditional Edomae sushi, kuruma ebi is usually lightly boiled then chilled, which enhances sweetness and creates a satisfying, layered bite. A true classic that instantly elevates any omakase experience.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, kuruma ebi is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑥ – Cooked Seafood / Ebi Course
 Often placed in later courses as a cooked highlight before uni or the finale.
Taste Profile
Naturally sweet and aromatic
Firm, bouncy, premium bite
Sweeter finish after light cooking
Key Highlights
✅ Premium sushi & omakase shrimp
✅ High sweetness with bouncy texture
✅ Best served in classic Edomae style (lightly cooked)
✅ A refined late-course highlight
Best For
Sushi (Lightly cooked recommended) | Optional sashimi | Salt/yuzu pairing | Omakase course

name: 黑鲳｜高脂细腻 · 深海风味（刺身级） Kuromutsu | Rich, Delicate & Deep-Sea Flavor (Sashimi Grade)
category: ⑤ 炙烧・熟成  Aburi & Aged Selection 火与时间带来更深的香气与旨味，味道开始变得更加浓郁而立体
unit: Approx. 2-2.5lb each | Price per lb | Charged by actual weight
description:
黑鯥（クロムツ / Kuromutsu）是日本料理中极具代表性的高端鱼种，以其油脂丰厚、香气浓郁、口感细嫩而闻名。此款为日本沼津产手钓（釣り）黑鯥，钓获鱼通常压力更小、肉质更紧实，整体风味更干净高级，是寿司店与Omakase料理中极受欢迎的“高脂白身主角”。
黑鯥的魅力在于：油脂丰富却不腻，入口即化般细嫩，鲜味和甜味层次饱满。无论做刺身、轻炙烧（Aburi）、盐烧或西京渍，都能呈现非常高级的香气与余韵。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，黑鯥通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑤–⑥步：浓郁主角段 / 炙烧熟物段（Rich Fish / Aburi & Cooked Course）
 通常安排在中后段，作为风味“加速器”或炙烧主角，推动整套Omakase进入高潮。
口感风味
油脂丰厚，入口细嫩
香气浓郁，甜味与鲜味层次强
余韵悠长，风味高级
产品亮点
✅ 日本沼津产：高品质近海渔场代表
✅ 手钓（釣り）：肉质更紧实，风味更干净
✅ 高脂白身鱼王者：香气浓、口感细腻
✅ Omakase主角常客：适合中后段高潮位
✅ 料理适配度高：刺身/炙烧/盐烧/西京渍都优秀
推荐吃法
轻炙烧（推荐）｜刺身｜盐烧｜西京渍｜煮付

Overview
Kuromutsu (Blackthroat Seaperch) is a highly prized premium fish in Japanese cuisine, celebrated for its rich fat content, luxurious aroma, and melt-in-your-mouth texture. This fresh, line-caught Kuromutsu from Numazu, Japan is especially valued for its cleaner flavor and firmer meat—an omakase favorite for richer, later courses.
Kuromutsu offers deep sweetness and umami with a buttery richness that never feels heavy. It shines as aburi (lightly seared), grilled, saikyo-yaki, or even sashimi, delivering an elegant long finish.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)

（如做蟹肉茶碗蒸/汤品，也可放 第⑤步 熟物段）
口感风味
细嫩鲜甜，纤维感漂亮
海味干净清爽，回甘明显
与海胆/鱼子搭配层次爆发
产品亮点
✅ 去壳拆肉条：省时省力，即开即用
✅ 松叶蟹鲜甜细嫩：风味高级，适配度高
✅ Omakase压轴神器：手卷/蟹丼一秒高级
✅ 摆盘更整齐：寿司/丼饭/冷盘都好看
推荐吃法
蟹肉手卷 Temaki（推荐）｜蟹肉小丼｜军舰寿司｜蟹肉沙拉｜蟹肉茶碗蒸/汤品

Japan Matsuba Crab Meat Strips (Shell-Off) – Orange Pack are premium Matsuba crab leg portions removed from the shell and neatly portioned into strips. Ready-to-use and perfect for clean, elegant plating. Matsuba crab is prized for its delicate sweetness, tender fibers, and clean ocean finish, making it ideal for temaki hand rolls, mini donburi bowls, and premium sushi garnishes.

 ✅ Step ⑧ – Finale (Temaki / Don Topping)
 A sweet and satisfying finish often served as hand rolls or mini don bowls.

Taste Profile
Sweet, tender crab fibers
Clean ocean umami
Pairs beautifully with uni or roe

✅ Naturally sweet premium Matsuba flavor
✅ Perfect for temaki, donburi, sushi plating
✅ Omakase finale favorite

name: 日本低溫急冻大拖鱼蓉（ねぎとろ）｜寿司用｜入口即化｜Omakase压轴｜ Japan Ultra-Low Temp Frozen Otoro Minced Tuna (Negitoro) | Sushi Grade | Melt-in-Your-Mouth | Omakase Favorite
category: 冷冻海鲜刺身｜Frozen Sashimi Portions
description:
日本低温急冻大拖鱼蓉（大トロたたき / ねぎとろ Negitoro）**是寿司店非常受欢迎的“爆脂系”人气食材。精选大拖部位打成细腻鱼蓉，油脂香气浓郁，入口柔滑细腻、回甘明显、几乎入口即化，非常适合做军舰寿司、手卷或小丼。
本品采用低温急冻方式锁住鲜度与油脂风味，解冻后即可直接用于寿司出品，是家庭Omakase与餐厅备货的高效之选。
Omakase定位（第几道）
在Omakase流程中，大拖鱼蓉通常属于：
 ✅ 第⑦–⑧步：金枪鱼段/终盘（Maguro Highlight / Finale）
 常用于军舰寿司或手卷，在海胆/终盘收尾前作为“满足感爆棚”的高光。
口感风味
油脂丰厚，香气浓郁
口感细腻柔滑，入口即化
甜味与回甘强，越吃越上头
产品亮点
✅ 低温急冻锁鲜：保留油脂香与鲜甜
✅ 寿司店同款ねぎとろ：军舰/手卷必备
✅ 出品效率高：解冻即可使用
✅ Omakase压轴加分：一口爆脂，幸福感拉满
推荐吃法
军舰寿司（推荐）｜手卷 Temaki（推荐）｜小丼 Donburi｜拌饭｜加葱花/海苔更香

Japan Ultra-Low Temp Frozen Otoro Minced Tuna (Negitoro Style) is a sushi-bar favorite known for its rich buttery fat and melt-in-your-mouth texture. Made from premium otoro portions finely minced into smooth negitoro, it delivers deep umami, sweetness, and an indulgent finish.
Flash frozen at ultra-low temperature to preserve freshness and fat quality. Simply thaw and serve for gunkan sushi, temaki hand rolls, or donburi bowls.
Omakase Placement (Course Step)
In an omakase progression, otoro negitoro is typically served as:
 ✅ Step ⑦–⑧ – Maguro Highlight / Finale
 Often plated as gunkan or temaki near the end for a rich, satisfying finish.
Taste Profile
Ultra rich, buttery otoro fat
Smooth, creamy, melt-in-mouth bite
Sweet umami with a long finish
Key Highlights
✅ Ultra-low temp frozen to preserve premium fat
✅ Sushi-grade negitoro for gunkan & temaki
✅ Easy prep: thaw and serve
✅ Perfect omakase finale highlight
Best For
Gunkan Sushi (Recommended) | Temaki (Recommended) | Donburi | Rice topping | Nori pairing
